TL;DR: 本文系统比较了小语言模型（SLM，360M-3B参数）与大语言模型（LLM）在关系抽取（RE）任务上的表现。研究发现，经过针对性任务微调后，Qwen2.5-0.5B（sub-billion模型）在通用领域RE上达到0.83的微F1分数，超过GPT-5.4（0.69）和Claude Sonnet 4.6（0.66）的零样本性能；在文学领域RE上，微调SLM在Biographical基准上达到0.92 vs GPT-5.4的0.83。结果表明，当任务特定数据可用时，紧凑型任务适配模型能在单消费级GPU上运行，同时提供准确、隐私保护且硬件高效的RE方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在关系抽取任务上表现优异，但其计算开销和对专有API的依赖限制了在资源受限或隐私敏感场景下的部署。本研究旨在探究小语言模型在多大程度上能够缩小这一差距，评估其在通用领域和文学文本上的关系抽取能力。

Method: 评估了5个模型（360M到3B参数），在3种领域组成体制和2种提示条件微调风格下（共30种配置），与零样本前沿LLM和判别式RoBERTa基线进行比较。在9个基准上测试，进行了领域自适应预训练的案例研究以及族内规模比较。

Result: 最佳sub-billion模型Qwen2.5-0.5B在通用领域微F1达0.83，超过GPT-5.4（0.69）和Claude Sonnet 4.6（0.66）的零样本性能。文学RE任务上，微调SLM在Biographical基准达0.92 vs GPT-5.4的0.83，文学平均为0.833 vs 0.578。领域自适应预训练无实质提升，族内规模比较仅显示边际改进。

Conclusion: 当任务特定数据可用时，紧凑型任务适配模型（包括4-bit量化、可在单消费级GPU部署的模型）能够提供准确、隐私保护且硬件高效的关系抽取方案。SLM的优势并非来自其内在容量，而是针对性任务微调带来的适配效果，判别式RoBERTa基线同样超越前沿模型进一步佐证了这一点。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong relation extraction (RE), but their computational demands and reliance on proprietary APIs limit deployment in resource-constrained or privacy-sensitive settings. We investigate how far small language models (SLMs) can close this gap across general-domain and literary text. We evaluate five models from 360M to 3B parameters under three domain-composition regimes and two prompt-conditioned tuning styles (30 configurations), comparing them with zero-shot frontier LLMs and a discriminative RoBERTa baseline. Across nine benchmarks, the best sub-billion model, Qwen2.5-0.5B fine-tuned on pooled general-domain data, achieves a general-domain positive-class micro-F1 of 0.83, versus 0.69 for GPT-5.4 and 0.66 for Claude Sonnet 4.6 evaluated zero-shot. This does not imply that SLMs are intrinsically stronger; rather, targeted task adaptation enables 4-bit models deployable on a single consumer GPU to outperform general-purpose frontier systems under this protocol. An in-domain RoBERTa baseline also exceeds both frontier models, indicating that the gain stems from task adaptation rather than generative decoding. On literary RE, tuned SLMs reach 0.92 on the human-annotated Biographical benchmark versus 0.83 for GPT-5.4, and 0.833 versus 0.578 on the two-benchmark literary average. A targeted domain-adaptive pretraining case study yields no practically meaningful gain over supervised fine-tuning, while the cleanest within-family scale comparison shows only marginal improvement. These results show that, when task-specific data are available, compact task-adapted models can provide accurate, private, and hardware-efficient RE.

</details>


### [361] [Orthogonal Representation Editing: Decoupling Semantic Entanglement in Batch Knowledge Editing of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22627)
*Wenhao Yu,Zhicong Lu,Bo Lv,Fangyin Ma,Kaiwen Wei,Shihao Yang,Nayu Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出正交表示编辑（ORE）方法，通过构建通用语义子空间并对编辑向量施加正交约束来解耦语义纠缠，结合门控非线性表示头自适应学习编辑位置，在不完全重新训练的情况下高效批量更新LLM中的事实知识，在跨语言知识编辑场景中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识编辑方法在批量编辑时性能下降，原因是语义表示纠缠（如概念重叠和共享语法模式）在表示空间中积累干扰，降低了编辑精度。

Method: 提出正交表示编辑（ORE），在LLM的隐藏表示空间中构建通用语义子空间，对编辑向量施加正交约束以解耦语义纠缠；并引入门控非线性表示头，实现编辑位置的适应性学习与知识注入的精确控制。

Result: 实验表明ORE在批量知识编辑中优于现有方法，并在跨语言知识编辑场景中取得卓越性能。

Conclusion: 通过正交约束解耦语义纠缠是提升批量知识编辑精度的有效途径，门控机制进一步增强了编辑的控制能力。

Abstract: Knowledge editing aims to efficiently update factual information in Large Language Models (LLMs) without full retraining. However, existing methods still suffer from performance degradation in batch knowledge editing. We identify that semantic representation entanglement, such as overlapping concepts and shared syntactic patterns, accumulates interference in the representation space and reduces editing precision. To bridge this gap, in this paper, we propose Orthogonal Representation Editing (ORE), which performs edits in the hidden representation space of LLMs by constructing a general semantic subspace and enforcing orthogonal constraints on edit vectors, effectively decoupling semantic entanglement. Furthermore, we introduce a gated non-linear representation head to enable adaptive learning of editing locations and precise control over knowledge injection. Extensive experiments show that ORE outperforms existing methods and achieves superior performance in cross-lingual knowledge editing scenarios. We release our code at https://github.com/YVVH/ORE.

</details>


### [362] [Only Ask What You Don't Know: Grounded Delta Planning for Efficient Multi-step RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22681)
*Wei-Chieh Chou,Xuanjun Chen,Jian-Ren Lin,Claire Lin,Hung-yi Lee,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GDP-RAG是一种基于增量规划的检索增强生成框架，通过三项简洁设计（初步检索锚定规划、缺口条件规划提示、骨架轨迹）聚焦未解决的信息缺口，在多跳问答中实现最高准确率（60.63%）且成本最低（0.51）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG方法在多跳问答中要么在迭代检索中传播错误，要么过度生成推理步骤增加成本，缺乏一种既准确又经济的方案。

Method: 三项设计：(1) 初步检索在执行规划前锚定上下文；(2) 缺口条件规划提示只询问缺失信息；(3) 骨架轨迹将每个子查询与Thought配对，捕获初步检索证据并传递至最终答案。

Result: 在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA和MuSiQue上，GDP-RAG准确率达60.63%，成本指标0.51，比PAR-RAG低22%，比KnowTrace低68%。

Conclusion: GDP-RAG通过聚焦计算于未解决的信息缺口，实现了更简洁可靠的推理轨迹，在准确率和成本上均优于现有方法。

Abstract: Multi-hop question answering remains challenging for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) because existing approaches either propagate errors across iterative retrieval rounds or over-generate reasoning steps, increasing cost without improving accuracy. We propose Grounded Delta Planning RAG (GDP-RAG), a plan-based framework that targets only the information delta based on three simple design choices: (1) preliminary retrieval to ground planning before execution, (2) a gap-conditioned planning prompt that asks only for missing information, and (3) a skeletal trajectory that pairs each subquery with a Thought capturing evidence from preliminary retrieval and carrying it through to the final answer. GDP-RAG focuses computation on unresolved gaps, yielding concise, reliable reasoning trajectories. Extensive experiments on HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, and MuSiQue show that GDP-RAG achieves the highest accuracy (60.63%) among all compared systems while maintaining a cost-of-pass of 0.51, 22% lower than PAR-RAG (0.65) and 68% lower than KnowTrace (1.57), with no method achieving both higher accuracy and lower cost.

</details>


### [363] [moBERTo: A Modern Encoder for Portuguese via Continued Pretraining of ModernBERT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22722)
*Thiago Laitz,Thales Sales Almeida,João Guilherme Alves Santos,Giovana Kerche Bonás*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: moBERTo 是一个基于 ModernBERT 的葡萄牙语适配模型，通过在 60B token 上继续预训练（12B 语料库，5 轮）获得，结合了葡萄牙语分词器、子词匹配嵌入迁移和长上下文后训练，在检索、分类、NER 和 NLU 任务上均取得最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Encoder-only transformer 模型在生产级 NLP 管道中仍然不可或缺，但已有的葡萄牙语 BERT 模型（如 BERTimbau）缺少对 ModernBERT 架构（旋转位置编码、交替局部-全局注意力、flash attention 等）的支持，且长上下文能力有限。因此需要为葡萄牙语开发一个基于 ModernBERT 的先进编码器模型。

Method: 基于 ModernBERT-base 检查点，在 60B token（5 轮，12B token 语料）上继续预训练。语料来自 FineWeb2，经教育性和 STEM 分类器过滤。保留原始架构（RoPE、交替局部-全局注意力、flash attention、unpadding）。探索了三种变体：仅继续预训练、加入葡萄牙语分词器+子词匹配嵌入迁移、再加入长上下文（8,192 tokens）后训练。

Result: 最优变体（结合葡萄牙语分词器、嵌入迁移和长上下文后训练）在三个葡萄牙语检索基准上取得最高的平均 reranking nDCG@10，并在 PLUE-PT 上取得最佳结果。消融实验表明：(i) 继续预训练优于从头训练，尤其保持长上下文能力；(ii) 分词器适配改善 token 级任务但降低长上下文检索；(iii) 长上下文后训练进一步改善 reranking 和 NER；(iv) 编码器架构在判别任务上仍可与大解码器模型竞争。

Conclusion: moBERTo 证明了通过继续预训练和针对性的后训练策略，Encoder-only 模型可以高效适配新语言并在多种任务上达到先进水平。模型和训练数据已开源发布。

Abstract: Encoder-only transformer models remain essential for production NLP pipelines. We introduce moBERTo, a Portuguese adaptation of ModernBERT obtained through continued pretraining of the ModernBERT-base checkpoint on 60 billion tokens (5 epochs over a 12-billion-token corpus curated from FineWeb2 and filtered with educational and STEM classifiers). We preserve the original architecture, including rotary positional embeddings, alternating local-global attention, flash attention, and unpadding. We evaluate moBERTo across information retrieval (including long-context retrieval at up to 8,192 tokens), document classification, named entity recognition, and natural language understanding. Our best variant, which combines a Portuguese tokenizer with subword-matching embedding transfer and long-context post-training, achieves the highest average reranking nDCG@10 across three Portuguese retrieval benchmarks and the best results on PLUE-PT. Through ablation studies, we show that (i) continued pretraining is strongly preferable to training from scratch, particularly for preserving long-context capabilities; (ii) tokenizer adaptation improves token-level tasks but degrades long-context retrieval; (iii) a dedicated long-context post-training phase at 8,192 tokens further improves reranking and NER; and (iv) encoder-only architectures remain competitive with larger decoder-only alternatives for discriminative tasks. We publicly release the model weights at https://huggingface.co/Tropic-AI/moBERTo and training data at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Tropic-AI/moberto-pretraining-dataset-c4-compatible on Hugging Face.

</details>


### [364] [BLUEX v2: Benchmarking LLMs on Open-Ended Questions from Brazilian University Entrance Exams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22723)
*João Guilherme Alves Santos,Giovana Kerche Bonás,Thiago Laitz,Thales Sales Almeida,Helio Pedrini*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: BLUEX v2是一个面向巴西高校第二阶段入学考试（UNICAMP和USP，2022-2025年）的葡萄牙语开放式论述题基准数据集，包含395道题（919个子题），55.7%含图像，涵盖21个LLM的评估。模型得分区间4.18-9.10（满分10），数学推理和图像理解是最难的能力维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在葡萄牙语上的评估不足，尤其是需要深度推理和生成的开放式论述任务。原始BLUEX基准仅涵盖巴西大学入学考试的多选题，未覆盖更具挑战性的第二阶段笔试（自由形式书面回答）。

Method: 构建BLUEX v2基准数据集，包含395道题（919个评分子题），55.7%含图像，每道题标注学科领域、官方参考答案、LLM生成的评分标准和六项认知能力标签。采用LLM-as-a-judge协议评估21个SOTA LLM。

Result: 模型得分区间4.18-9.10（满分10），性能差距4.92分；数学推理和图像理解是最难的能力维度。

Conclusion: BLUEX v2填补了葡萄牙语开放式论述评估的空白，揭示了当前LLM在数学推理和图像理解方面的短板，数据集和代码已公开。

Abstract: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in many tasks, their assessment in Portuguese has received less attention, particularly for open-ended, discursive tasks that demand deeper reasoning and generation capabilities. While the original BLUEX benchmark addressed the scarcity of Portuguese evaluation datasets through multiple-choice questions from Brazilian university entrance exams, it did not cover the more challenging second-phase examinations, which require free-form written responses. In this work, we introduce BLUEX v2, a benchmark derived from the second-phase entrance exams of Brazil's two leading universities: UNICAMP (Comvest) and USP (Fuvest), spanning exam years 2022-2025. Our dataset comprises 395 questions unfolding into 919 graded subquestions, with 55.7% of questions containing associated images. Each question is annotated with subject area, official reference answers, LLM-generated rubric criteria, and six cognitive capability tags. We evaluate 21 state-of-the-art LLMs using an LLM-as-a-judge protocol. Results reveal a 4.92-point performance spread across models (4.18-9.10 on a 0-10 scale), with Mathematical Reasoning and Image Understanding emerging as the hardest capability dimensions. The dataset, evaluation code, and model outputs are publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BLUEXv2.

</details>


### [365] [When Confidence Takes the Wrong Path: Diagnosing Retrieval-State Lock-In in RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22728)
*Sahib Julka*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现RAG系统中存在“检索状态锁定”问题——即多次采样得到一致答案并非真正的置信度，而是因为检索状态缺陷被稳定复制。通过将置信度分解为答案表面、检索证据和检索状态三个对象，在KG-RAG系统中测得42%的误差在5次采样中零分散，而证据和状态检查仍能标记它们。提出的可审计决策规则在69.7%接受率下达到91.9%精确率，但仅认证7.7%答案为低风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有黑盒不确定性方法错误地将采样答案的一致性解读为置信度，忽略了当检索状态存在缺陷（空检索或错误但一致的邻居）时，多次采样会复制相同错误，导致“虚假一致”。该问题在部署RAG中已被认识但缺乏命名、可测量特征和普遍性界限。

Method: (1) 命名问题为“检索状态锁定”；(2) 将单一置信度分数解耦为三个对象：答案表面、检索证据和检索状态；(3) 在可检查的、本体引导的知识图谱RAG（KG-RAG）系统中，对六个问答快照进行测量；(4) 设计可审计决策规则：仅当答案、证据和检索检查均认为低风险时才接受答案。

Result: 五次采样下，42%的KG-RAG错误和59%的密集检索错误具有零答案分散度；可审计决策规则在69.7%接受率下达到91.9%合并精确率，但仅认证7.7%答案为低风险；在临床校准领域达到100%精确率。

Conclusion: RAG中的置信度是对象特定的——当答案一致时，有用的问题是质疑管道的哪一部分，而非盲目信任一致性。分解置信度可实现更可审计、更可靠的决策。

Abstract: The trustworthiness of a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system depends on more than the answer it returns, yet many black-box uncertainty methods still read agreement among sampled answers as confidence. That inference fails when repeated samples condition on the same defective retrieval state. The state may be empty, with the model falling back on parametric memory, or populated by a coherent but wrong neighbourhood. In either case, the answers agree because the error is stable. The problem is recognised in deployed RAG, but it has lacked a name, a measurable signature, and a prevalence bound. We supply all three. We name the failure retrieval-state lock-in and diagnose it by separating the three objects a single confidence score conflates: the answer surface, the retrieved evidence, and the retrieval state itself. In an inspectable, ontology-guided knowledge-graph RAG (KG-RAG) system across six question-answering snapshots, we measure the agreement blind spot directly: at five samples per question, 42% of KG-RAG errors and 59% of dense-retrieval errors carry zero answer dispersion, so agreement has nothing to rank, while evidence- and retrieval-state checks still flag most of them. The decomposition supports an auditable decision rule: accepting an answer only when answer, evidence, and retrieval checks all agree that it is low-risk reaches 91.9% pooled precision against a 69.7% accept-all rate. The cost is coverage: it certifies only 7.7% of answers as low-risk. On the clinical calibration domain it reaches 100% precision under an automated judge; this is an in-domain automated-label upper bound, not a clinical safety claim, and still needs human validation. Confidence in RAG is object-specific: when answers agree, the useful question is which part of the pipeline to distrust.

</details>


### [366] [Language-Specific Sentiment Polarity Biases in Encoder and Large Language Model Classification of Product Reviews](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22745)
*Advita Rajiv,Kavitha Kothur,Gautham Reddy*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究调查了AI模型在不同语言中分类正面与负面评论时的情感极性偏差，发现大语言模型在法语中存在负面偏差（对负面评论更准确），而编码器模型在日语中存在正面偏差（漏判使用间接批评的负面评论）。这些语言特定的极性偏差对部署多语言情感分析系统的社会和商业领域具有重要意义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究AI模型在不同语言和架构下对正面与负面评论分类准确率的差异，即情感极性偏差的存在及其表现形式。

Method: 比较不同语言（法语、日语等）和不同模型架构（大语言模型 vs 编码器模型）在情感极性分类上的准确率差异。

Result: 大语言模型在法语中表现出负面偏差（对负面评论更准确），而编码器模型在日语中表现出正面偏差（漏判使用间接批评的负面评论）。

Conclusion: 情感极性偏差具有语言特异性，对多语言情感分析系统的社会与商业应用有重要影响。

Abstract: This study investigates sentiment polarity biases, specifically, differences in how accurately AI models classify positive versus negative reviews across languages and model architectures. Large language models show a negative bias in French and are more accurate on negative reviews, while encoder models exhibit positive bias in Japanese, missing negative reviews that use indirect criticism. These language-specific polarity biases have implications in both social and business domains deploying multilingual sentiment analysis systems.

</details>


### [367] [AI Fiction in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22748)
*Neel Gupta,Maria Antoniak,Melanie Walsh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文基于50万+匿名ChatGPT对话数据，发现超过三分之一的对话涉及AI生成虚构内容（原创故事、角色扮演、同人小说、情色文学），用户呈现出"无限故事需求者"等模式，并提出"唯我论读者-作者"概念，认为AI技术正在重塑作者与读者的传统关系，推动文学向按需、个性化、重复性的文化形式转变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大型语言模型如何重塑虚构作品的创作与消费，特别是在普通用户（而非专业作家）中使用AI生成叙事的实际规模、模式和特征。

Method: 对arXiv:2405.01470数据集中超过50万条匿名ChatGPT用户对话进行量化分析，识别虚构生成对话的比例、用户模式及特征。

Result: 超过三分之一对话涉及虚构生成；AI生成虚构主要由高活跃度"权力用户"主导；识别出"无限故事需求者"等用户类型；用户明显偏好同人小说和情色文学；倾向于通用形式、重复性、即时性和小众元素组合。

Conclusion: AI技术可能导致"唯我论读者-作者"的出现，即用户在与机器的封闭对话循环中同时生成和消费虚构内容；LLM的交互性、游戏性和排列组合特性对用户产生明显愉悦感，引发AI在当代叙事与娱乐生态中角色的深层问题。

Abstract: Some professional authors are beginning to use AI tools to help produce their fiction writing. Are readers using AI to generate fiction, too? This paper examines how large language models are reshaping the production and consumption of fiction by enabling new forms of participation in narrative generation. Drawing on over 500,000 anonymized, English-language ChatGPT-user conversations (arXiv:2405.01470), we find that more than one third of the conversations involve some form of fiction generation -- including original stories, roleplay, fanfiction, and erotica. This AI-generated fiction is notably dominated by power users. We identify common fiction generation patterns and profiles among these users, including what we call "infinite story demanders," who repeatedly request and revise variations of the same or similar narratives over extended periods of time. We show that users especially gravitate toward fanfiction and erotica, and that they are broadly drawn to generic forms, repetition, immediacy, and niche combinations of story elements. Our findings motivate two theoretical provocations. First, we argue that AI technologies may lead to a shift in the conventional relationship between the author and reader, potentially producing what we call a "solipsistic reader-writer," who both generates and consumes fiction within a closed conversational loop, interacting with a machine rather than a human other. Second, we note that LLMs enable interactivity, play, and permutation in ways that are seemingly pleasurable for users, raising questions about where AI will fit into contemporary storytelling and entertainment ecosystems. We situate these developments within broader transformations in literature and media, including self-publishing, fanfiction, and pornography, and suggest that AI-generated fiction shares structural affinities with on-demand, personalized, and repetitive cultural forms.

</details>


### [368] [Learning Moral Diversity: Modelling Individual Perspectives in Moral Classification of Texts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22771)
*Yi Ren,Lewis Mitchell,Matthew Roughan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出在预训练语言模型中引入标注者特异性特征层，以建模标注者之间的主观分歧，从而更真实地反映道德判断的个体差异，并证明聚合标签会掩盖重要变异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有道德价值分类方法通常将多个标注者的标签聚合成单一"真实标签"，忽视了标注任务固有的主观性以及标注者之间因个人观点或文本歧义导致的分歧，尤其是短推文场景。

Method: 在预训练语言模型基础上扩展一个学习标注者特异性特征的网络层，使模型能够预测个体标注而非聚合标签。

Result: 模型改进了对个体标注的预测能力，生成的表征能揭示标注者道德视角的有意义洞察；聚合标签训练会隐藏标注变异性并产生误导性的性能表现。

Conclusion: 标注者之间的分歧反映了道德判断任务固有的主观性，对个体视角进行建模能为文本道德分类带来实际收益。

Abstract: Understanding moral values in social media text offers insight into moral judgement formation, and supervised NLP models trained on crowdsourced data have achieved strong classification performance. However, most approaches simplify the problem by aggregating multiple annotators' labels into a single "ground truth", overlooking the inherent subjectivity of the task. In practice, there are disagreements between annotators caused by personal viewpoint or inherent ambiguities, particularly for short tweets. Here, we extend a pretrained language model with a layer that learns annotator-specific features. Our model improves predictions of individual annotations and yields representations that reveal meaningful insights into annotators' moral perspectives. We show that models trained on aggregated labels may hide variation and give a misleading impression of performance. Overall, we demonstrate that disagreement reflects the inherent subjectivity of the task and that modelling individual perspectives creates benefits for moral classification of texts.

</details>


### [369] [Does the Same Token Mean the Same State? MoE Routing as Signal for Reasoning Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22798)
*Kang Chen,Minshen Yu,Junjie Nian,Yaoning Wang,Yixin Cao,Yugang Jiang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现稀疏MoE语言模型中，相同token id并不对应相同的路由状态和专家激活；路由结构保留了任务上下文、轨迹历史和推理模式等信息。基于此提出RAD（路由协议解码）方法，利用锚点附近的MoE路由状态作为多输出选择器，无需解析答案字符串，在数学、代码等任务上达到与多数投票相当或更优的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究稀疏MoE语言模型中，相同token id是否对应相同的路由器状态和产生它的专家。实验发现并非如此，专家选择仍分离任务上下文、轨迹历史和推理模式，这种残差结构可用于测试时控制。

Method: 提出RAD（路由协议解码）方法：定位固定锚点（如边界锚点或分隔符锚点），用每个rollout的锚点窗口MoE路由状态表示，通过加权Jaccard K近邻返回最密集的路由盆地中心，无需解析、归一化、执行或投票答案字符串。

Result: 在10种稀疏MoE配置（gpt-oss, Qwen3-MoE）和6个数据集（数学、GPQA、代码）上，RAD（73.9%）和RAD+DC（74.2%）与多数投票（73.6%）相当，有小幅正向差异。在代码任务上，RAD可直接用于pass@1选择（精确字符串投票不适用），在SWE-bench Verified上，基于路由密度的补丁选择优于随机基线。

Conclusion: RAD提供了一种新的接口：无需答案字符串即可进行多输出选择，在字符串投票不适用的场景（如代码生成、补丁选择）中具有价值。但RAD不是验证器，密集的错误盆地仍可能获胜。

Abstract: In sparse Mixture-of-Experts language models, does the same token id imply the same router state and the same experts producing it? Holding the emitted token id fixed at repeated anchors, we find it does not: the experts that produce it still separate task context, trajectory history, and reasoning-effort mode. This residual structure supports test-time control: near \emph{boundary} anchors (the final-response transition) and \emph{delimiter} anchors (which open the answer, e.g.\ \texttt{\textbackslash boxed\{} or code fences), routing neighborhoods already align with final-answer basins at a marker-only readout and strongest when the routing is read at the answer opening. We operationalize this as \textbf{RAD} (Routing Agreement Decoding), an answer-string-free multi-rollout selector: it locates a fixed anchor, represents each rollout by its anchor-window MoE routing states, and returns the densest Weighted-Jaccard $K$-NN route-basin center, without parsing, normalizing, executing, or voting over answer strings. Across 10 sparse-MoE configurations (gpt-oss, Qwen3-MoE) and 6 datasets spanning math, GPQA, and code, RAD is on par with Majority where string voting is well-posed, with small positive paired deltas (RAD $73.9$ / RAD+DC $74.2$ vs.\ Majority $73.6$). Like majority voting, RAD is not a verifier: a dense \emph{wrong} basin can still win. Its value is the interface: the same selector gives direct pass@1 on code, where exact-string voting is ill-defined, and the same routing-density principle, re-anchored to the agentic boundary, improves best-of-16 patch selection on SWE-bench Verified over random, where patches have no answer string to vote on.

</details>


### [370] [KaLM-Reranker-V1: Fast but Not Late Interaction for Compressed Document Reranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22807)
*Xinping Zhao,Jiaxin Xu,Ziqi Dai,Xin Zhang,Shouzheng Huang,Danyu Tang,Xinshuo Hu,Meishan Zhang,Baotian Hu,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: KaLM-Reranker-V1提出了一种快速但非延迟交互的编码器-解码器重排序器，通过解耦查询和段落计算，利用Matryoshka嵌入池化预编码段落，交叉注意力建模查询-段落相关性，在BEIR上达到SOTA性能，大幅提升部署效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的重排序器（无论是编码器还是解码器）都需要联合编码查询和段落，导致计算紧密耦合，部署效率低且灵活性差。作者旨在解耦查询和段落计算，同时保持强大的相关性建模能力。

Method: 采用编码器-解码器架构：编码器使用Matryoshka嵌入池化预编码段落；解码器建模系统指令、用户指令和查询意图；通过交叉注意力捕捉查询上下文与段落表示之间的相关性。设计了Nano(0.27B)、Small(1B)和Large(4B)三种尺寸。

Result: 在BEIR上达到SOTA性能，与Qwen3-Reranker系列相当；MIRACL上即使未经过多语言数据训练仍表现优异；LMEB上0.27B Nano模型可与7-12B嵌入模型竞争。

Conclusion: KaLM-Reranker-V1通过解耦查询-段落计算实现了高效部署，同时通过交叉注意力保留了丰富的相关性建模能力，验证了FBNL范式的有效性。

Abstract: As retrieval systems scale, high-quality reranking becomes increasingly important. However, most existing rerankers, whether encoder-based or decoder-based, jointly encode the query and passage, tightly coupling their computation and limiting deployment efficiency as well as flexibility. We present KaLM-Reranker-V1, a fast but not late-interaction (FBNL) reranker that decouples query and passage computation while retaining expressive relevance modeling. Built on an encoder-decoder architecture, KaLM-Reranker-V1 uses the encoder to pre-encode passages with Matryoshka embedding pooling, while the decoder models the system instruction, user instruction, and query intent; cross-attention then captures relevance between the query context and passage representations. This design makes KaLM-Reranker-V1 efficient through decoupled passage encoding, yet not late interaction, by preserving rich relevance modeling through cross-attention. We instantiate KaLM-Reranker-V1 in three sizes, Nano, Small, and Large, with 0.27B, 1B, and 4B activated parameters, respectively. Extensive experiments on BEIR, MIRACL, and LMEB demonstrate that KaLM-Reranker-V1 achieves strong reranking performance with superior efficiency. On BEIR, KaLM-Reranker-V1 achieves state-of-the-art performance, on par with strong industrial models such as the Qwen3-Reranker series; on MIRACL, despite not being extensively trained on multilingual data, KaLM-Reranker-V1 still shows excellent reranking performance. Moreover, on LMEB, reranking models demonstrate a clear advantage, with even the 0.27B Nano model remaining competitive with 7-12B embedding models.

</details>


### [371] [Bagpiper-TTS: Natural Language Guided Universal Speech Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22811)
*Jinchuan Tian,Haoran Wang,Siddhant Arora,Takashi Maekaku,Keita Goto,Jin Sakuma,Yusuke Shinohara,Chao-Han Huck Yang,Shinji Watanabe*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Bagpiper-TTS是一个通用语音合成系统，通过自然语言提示推理用户意图生成丰富描述（含转录和元数据），进而合成目标语音，支持多说话人、意图到语音、角色扮演、歌声合成等多种任务，在Seed-TTS-Eval基准上达到1.7%的WER。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统TTS系统依赖刚性输入格式和预定义元数据槽位，无法满足灵活的用户需求。

Method: 给定自然语言提示，先推理用户意图生成包含转录和元数据的丰富描述（文本蓝图），再基于该描述引导目标语音合成。

Result: 在Seed-TTS-Eval基准上WER为1.7%，在LLM-as-a-judge和人类主观评估中与专用模型性能相当。

Conclusion: Bagpiper-TTS作为一个通用系统，能够处理多种自然语言用户请求，超越传统TTS应用范围。

Abstract: Classical TTS systems typically rely on rigid input formats and predefined metadata slots, limiting their ability to fulfill flexible user requirements. This paper introduces Bagpiper-TTS, a universal speech synthesis system that deals with diverse natural language user requests. Given a natural language prompt, Bagpiper-TTS first reasons over the users' intent to derive a rich caption, i.e., a comprehensive textual blueprint encompassing both transcription and nuanced metadata. Subsequently, this caption guides the synthesis of the target speech. Our model inherently supports a broad spectrum of tasks besides classical TTS applications, including multi-talker, intent-to-speech, role-play synthesis, singing voice synthesis, and more. Experimental results demonstrate that Bagpiper-TTS achieves an 1.7% Word Error Rate (WER) on the Seed-TTS-Eval benchmark and match the performance of dedicated models in both LLM-as-a-judge and human subjective evaluations across multiple applications.

</details>


### [372] [IndicGuard: A Multilingual Safety Guard Model and Dataset for Indic Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22841)
*Parth Bramhecha,Smit Deshmukh,Sairaj Bodhale,Adwait Borate,Raviraj Joshi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出IndicGuard，一个针对10种印度语言构建的多语言安全护栏模型和数据集，通过微调Gemma-3-4B-IT实现文化敏感的内容审核，在跨语言鲁棒性和低资源语言泛化方面显著优于基线模型CultureGuard。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM安全机制主要针对英语优化，无法捕捉印度地区独特的社会文化敏感性和本地化危害类别，亟需一个面向印度语言的多语言安全对齐方案。

Method: 构建覆盖10种印度语言的大规模文化敏感安全数据集，包含区域危害、敏感社会政治语境和对抗性越狱样本；基于Gemma-3-4B-IT指令微调得到4B参数的多语言安全护栏模型IndicGuard，用于实时内容审核与策略合规检查。

Result: IndicGuard在多种对话轮次中实现高一致性审核，在所有评估语言上持续优于基线模型CultureGuard，且有效泛化到训练中未包含的低资源印度语言。

Conclusion: IndicGuard证明了跨语言迁移能力和框架的结构鲁棒性，为印度语言环境下的LLM安全对齐提供了有效方案。

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve widespread integration across diverse linguistic landscapes, ensuring their safety and alignment with regional normative values remains a critical challenge. Current safety mechanisms are predominantly optimized for English-centric frameworks, often failing to capture the unique socio-cultural sensitivities and localized categories of harm inherent to the Indic region. To address this gap, we introduce IndicGuard, a multilingual safety guard model and dataset for Indic languages. We construct a high-volume, culturally nuanced safety dataset encompassing ten major Indic languages, systematically curated to capture regional harms, sensitive socio-political contexts, and adversarial jailbreaks. Leveraging this corpus, we fine-tune a 4B-parameter instruction-tuned model based on Gemma-3-4B-IT to serve as a multilingual safety guardrail for real-time content moderation and policy compliance checking. Our empirical evaluations demonstrate that IndicGuard significantly enhances LLM robustness against localized vulnerabilities, achieving high moderation consistency across different conversational turns. Crucially, IndicGuard consistently outperforms the existing baseline model, CultureGuard, across evaluated languages. Finally, we demonstrate that our model effectively generalizes to low-resource Indic languages excluded from training, substantiating the structural robustness and cross-lingual transfer capabilities of the framework.

</details>


### [373] [DynamicMem: A Long-Horizon Memory Benchmark in Real-World Settings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22877)
*Wenya Xie,Shengming Zhou,Zelin Li,Pouya Parsa,Shuang Zhou,Xinheng Ding,Chinmay Arvind,Guanchu Wang,Vladimir Braverman,Ali Payani,Yantao Zheng,Zirui Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DynamicMem是一个合成基准，模拟用户15个月的多应用活动数据（平均220万token/用户），用于评估LLM代理在异构、随时间演变的用户画像记忆能力，发现现有系统在长历史记忆衰退、事实更新困难以及93%以上失败源于记忆检索而非推理等问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准通过短时、简化的交互评估LLM代理的"记忆"能力，忽略了真实用户画像的三大核心特性：异质性（属性、习惯、偏好在不同时间尺度上演化）、变化的驱动因素（季节、生活事件等外部情境）、以及证据很少明确陈述，而是散布在不同应用的众多小行为中需要推理。

Method: 构建合成基准DynamicMem，为每个用户生成15个月的多应用活动数据（16个应用，如电商、健身、社交平台），平均220万token和1,772个接地事件/用户。画像随时间演变且从不显式给出，每个属性/习惯/偏好需从跨应用的小信号中推理。在5个季度检查点评估系统随历史增长的扩展能力。

Result: 基准测试5个代表性系统发现：(i) 画像重构性能随历史长度退化，但服务任务准确率保持平稳；(ii) 没有系统能同时保持不变的事实并替换已变化的事实，错误集中在偏好和命名准确指称上；(iii) 超过93%的失败源于记忆检索而非模型生成答案。

Conclusion: 最大的改进空间在于记忆系统本身，而非推理模型；单一准确率指标会掩盖系统在长历史记忆衰退、事实更新等方面的根本问题。

Abstract: LLM agents increasingly act as personal assistants that must remember a user's profile over months: who they are (attributes), what they routinely do (habits), and what they prefer (preferences), and keep it updated as jobs, routines, and tastes drift. Existing benchmarks evaluate this "memory" ability through short, simplified interactions, missing three core properties of real behavior: the profile is heterogeneous, with attributes, habits, and preferences evolving on different timelines; changes are driven by external context such as seasons and life events; and evidence is rarely stated explicitly, instead scattered across many small actions in different apps that a memory system must infer from. We introduce DynamicMem, a synthetic benchmark that constructs 15 months of activity per user, providing long-term multi-app data that real users' privacy keeps out of reach. It provides user-consistent trajectories averaging 2.2M tokens and 1,772 grounded events per user across 16 applications such as e-commerce, fitness, and social platforms. The profile evolves over this period and is never given explicitly: each attribute, habit, or preference must be inferred from small signals scattered across apps. We evaluate at five quarterly checkpoints to track how systems scale as history grows. Benchmarking five representative systems exposes problems a single accuracy score hides: (i) profile reconstruction degrades with history length while service-task accuracy stays flat, despite both drawing on the same memory; (ii) no system both keeps facts that stay true and replaces facts that change, with errors clustering on preferences and on naming the exact referent; and (iii) over 93% of failures trace to what the memory retrieves, not to the model writing the answer, so the largest room for improvement lies in memory itself. Code: https://wenyaxie023.github.io/DynamicMem/

</details>


### [374] [Explanation-Guided Medical Named Entity Recognition with Stability and Boundary Awareness for Atopic Dermatitis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22886)
*Xueguang Li,Di Lin,Xue Jiang,Yanxi Li,Yugang Chi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种稳定性和边界感知的解释引导NER框架，通过扰动分析评估解释稳定性与实体边界敏感性，并采用自适应融合策略结合局部和全局解释，在中文特应性皮炎临床文本上提升了NER模型的识别性能和解释可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升中文特应性皮炎临床文本中医学命名实体识别的可靠性和鲁棒性，解决现有NER方法在解释稳定性和边界感知方面的不足。

Method: 提出稳定性和边界感知的解释引导NER框架，包括：(1) 基于扰动的分析评估解释稳定性与实体边界敏感性；(2) 自适应融合策略动态结合局部和全局解释以生成更可靠的token级解释；(3) 通过稳定性约束、边界感知约束和一致性约束将解释信号融入模型训练。

Result: 在中文AD NER数据集上，该框架提升了解释鲁棒性，并在多个NER模型上取得一致的性能提升；自适应融合策略相比单一解释方法提供了更稳定的解释和更强的边界感知能力。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效将可靠解释信号融入医学NER训练，同时提升了识别性能和解释可靠性，为可解释医学NER提供了实用且可泛化的解决方案，为下游临床决策和医学知识应用提供了可靠支持。

Abstract: Objective: This study aims to improve the reliability and robustness of medical named entity recognition (NER) in Chinese atopic dermatitis (AD) clinical texts through explanation-guided learning. Methods: We propose a stability and boundary-aware explanation-guided NER framework. Perturbation-based analysis is used to evaluate explanation stability and entity boundary sensitivity. An adaptive fusion strategy dynamically combines local and global explanation to generate more reliable token-level explanations. The fused explanation signals are further incorporated into model training through stability, boundary-aware, and consistency constraints. Results: Experiments on Chinese AD NER datasets show that the proposed framework improves explanation robustness and achieves consistent performance gains across multiple NER models. The adaptive fusion strategy also provides more stable explanations and stronger boundary perception than individual explanation methods. Conclusion: The proposed method effectively integrates reliable explanation signals into medical NER training, improving both recognition performance and explanation reliability. The framework provides a practical and generalizable solution for explainable medical NER and offers reliable support for downstream clinical decision-making and medical knowledge applications.

</details>


### [375] [Understanding Knowledge Distillation in Post-Training: When It Helps and When It Fails](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22942)
*Xin Liu,Simin Ma,Shujian Liu,Song Wang,Sathish Reddy Indurthi,Haoyun Deng,Lu Wang,Kaiqiang Song*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了知识蒸馏在后训练阶段的效果，发现KD在低数据场景下优于SFT，但优势随数据量增加而减弱；更强的指令调优教师模型即使在数据充足时也能带来显著收益；提出了两阶段KD策略，在低资源场景下持续提升学生模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型计算成本高，限制了其在资源受限环境中的部署。知识蒸馏虽是一种可行的解决方案，但以往研究多聚焦于任务特定或小规模场景，对后训练阶段构建通用指令遵循模型的研究不足。

Method: 在Tulu 3大规模数据集上进行系统性的知识蒸馏研究；对比KD与SFT在不同数据量下的表现；蒸馏不同强度的指令调优教师模型；提出两阶段KD策略：先用合成教师标注数据蒸馏，再用人标注数据精炼。

Result: KD在低数据场景下优于SFT，但优势随数据量增加而减弱；从更强指令调优教师蒸馏在数据充足时仍带来显著提升；两阶段KD策略在低资源场景下持续改善学生模型性能。

Conclusion: 知识蒸馏在后训练中有效，尤其是在数据稀缺环境下；更强的教师知识能弥补数据不足；两阶段策略为构建紧凑模型提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across many tasks, but their high computational cost limits deployment in resource-constrained environments. Knowledge Distillation (KD) offers a practical solution by transferring knowledge from a teacher model of a larger size to a smaller student model. While prior work has mainly examined task-specific or small-scale settings, the post-training stage for building general instruction-following models has received limited attention. In this paper, we conduct a systematic study of KD in post-training using the large-scale Tulu 3 dataset. We find that KD outperforms supervised fine-tuning (SFT) in low-data regimes, but its advantage diminishes as more training data is added. Distilling from a stronger instruction-tuned teacher restores substantial gains even with abundant data, indicating that KD remains effective when the teacher provides knowledge that the student cannot easily acquire from the training data alone. We further study domain-specific, low-resource scenarios and propose a two-stage KD strategy that leverages synthetic teacher-labeled data followed by refinement on human annotations. This method consistently improves student performance, providing practical guidance for building compact models in data-scarce environments.

</details>


### [376] [StatABench: Dataset and Framework for Evaluating Statistical Analysis Capabilities of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22977)
*Youxin Zhu,Yixuan Ding,Peng Lai,Longyue Wang,Bingyi Jing,Guanhua Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: StatABench是一个系统评估大语言模型统计分析能力的基准，包含404道封闭题和30道开放建模题。实验表明即使GPT-5.1在封闭题上也仅达68.6%，最佳开源模型60.6%，揭示LLM与可靠统计分析之间的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有针对LLM在统计分析领域的评估基准在范围和形式上均存在局限性，缺乏系统性的、全面的评估框架。

Method: 构建StatABench基准，包含两个互补组件：Stat-Closed（404道题，涵盖18个统计主题，含选择题、填空题、决策题和实践应用题四种格式）和Stat-Open（30个来自专业竞赛的复杂开放建模任务）。采用LangChain MCP框架和多种数据科学智能体评估LLM，并使用LLM-as-Judge协议评估开放题解。

Result: GPT-5.1在Stat-Closed上仅达68.6%，最佳开源模型60.6%；Stat-Open上最佳智能体框架平均得分为61.86。

Conclusion: 当前LLM与可靠统计分析之间仍存在显著差距，在工具接地推理、方法论决策和端到端统计建模方面面临持续挑战。

Abstract: Statistical analysis is a broad, complex field requiring both domain knowledge and tool proficiency. While prior work has evaluated large language models (LLMs) in this domain, existing benchmarks remain limited in scope and format. To bridge this gap, we introduce StatABench (Statistical AnalysisBenchmark), a benchmark designed to systematically assess LLMs' statistical analysis capabilities. StatABench comprises two complementary components: Stat-Closed, containing 404 questions across 18 statistical topics in multiple formats (multiple-choice, fill-in-the-blank, decision-making, and practical application), and Stat-Open, featuring 30 complex open-ended modeling tasks adapted from professional competitions. We evaluate diverse LLMs using the LangChain MCP framework and multiple data science agents, and assess Stat-Open solutions via a validated LLM-as-Judge protocol. Experiments show that even GPT-5.1 achieves only 68.6% on Stat-Closed, while the best open-source model reaches 60.6%. On Stat-Open, the top agent framework scores 61.86 on average. These results reveal the gap between current LLMs and reliable statistical analysis, highlighting persistent challenges in tool-grounded reasoning, methodological decision-making, and end-to-end statistical modeling.

</details>


### [377] [Predicate Importance Estimation and Decoupled Rationale-Score Distillation for Entity Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22992)
*Keunha Kim,Yoonjin Jang,Hyeon-gu Lee,Sihyung Kim,Youngjoong Ko*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对知识图谱集成中的实体对齐问题，提出了谓词重要性估计（PIE）和去耦理由-分数蒸馏（DRSD）两个互补模块。PIE通过去除主语信息并学习谓词重要性权重来构建谓词感知的实体嵌入；DRSD则通过教师LLM生成伪答案，训练小型语言模型进行推理与置信度估计的去耦学习。实验表明两者均提升了EA分类性能，且DRSD的置信度与决策之间的差异可标记不确定预测供人工审核。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业级KG-RAG系统需要整合来自异构数据库的公共和领域特定知识图谱，这依赖于实体对齐（EA）。然而，在谓词名称变化和不完整局部邻域的条件下，纯词汇匹配不足以完成EA任务，因此需要更有效的EA方法支持KG集成。

Method: 1) PIE：从1跳三元组中去除主语信息，编码为无主语三元组，并用可学习的谓词重要性权重聚合，生成谓词感知的实体嵌入。2) DRSD：教师LLM通过不同提示生成伪答案，蒸馏到小型语言模型（SLM）中，将二元EA标签转为文本监督，并将置信度分数估计与标签一致的推理理由去耦学习。

Result: 实验表明PIE和DRSD均提升了实体对齐分类性能。DRSD由于将置信度估计与决策去耦，两者不一致时可标记为不确定预测，从而支持自动接受与人工审核的混合机制。

Conclusion: PIE和DRSD两个互补模块有效改进了知识图谱集成中的实体对齐，尤其DRSD的去耦设计为实际部署中的人机协同审核提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Knowledge graphs (KGs) are increasingly used as structured context for Large Language Models (LLMs), but industrial KG-RAG systems often need to integrate public and domain-specific KGs constructed from heterogeneous databases. This integration relies on Entity Alignment (EA), where lexical matching alone is insufficient under predicate-name variation and incomplete local neighborhoods. We address EA for KG integration by constructing a pairwise EA dataset and proposing two complementary modules: Predicate Importance Estimation (PIE) and Decoupled Rationale-Score Distillation (DRSD). PIE is a compact embedding-based approach that removes the subject information from each 1-hop triple, encodes the resulting subjectless triples, and aggregates them with learnable predicate-importance weights to build predicate-aware entity embeddings. DRSD trains a distilled small language model (SLM) with pseudo-answers produced by a teacher LLM through distinct prompts. By converting binary EA labels into text-based supervision and decoupling confidence-score estimation from label-consistent rationales, DRSD enables the SLM to learn task-specific reasoning while retaining a less label-biased confidence signal. Experiments show that PIE and DRSD improve EA classification. Moreover, because DRSD decouples confidence-score estimation from the decision, a discrepancy between the two flags an uncertain prediction for human review, thereby enabling a practical discrepancy between automatic acceptance and human-in-the-loop verification.

</details>


### [378] [Machine Translation and Post-Editing: Comparative Evaluation of Different MT Systems and Post-Editor Groups in Specialised Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23002)
*Joachim Minder,Alexandra Mestivier,Natalie Kübler*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文评估了英译法专业翻译中三种机器翻译系统（DeepL、eTranslation、Systran）的质量以及两组译者（语言学家/翻译员 vs NLP专家）的译后编辑表现，发现系统间和译员组间存在显著差异，尤其在术语准确性和流畅性方面，强调了领域知识在专业翻译中的重要性及MT系统在特定用途语言中的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在评估专业翻译场景下机器翻译和译后编辑的质量，探究不同MT系统与不同背景译后编辑者的表现差异。

Method: 对比三种MT系统（DeepL、eTranslation、Systran），邀请两组译后编辑者（语言学/翻译专家 vs NLP专家）进行译后编辑，采用针对MT和PE评估调整的错误类型标注方法进行翻译质量评估。

Result: 三种MT系统之间存在显著差异，两组译后编辑者的表现也存在明显不同，尤其在术语准确性和流畅性维度上差异突出。

Conclusion: 领域知识在专业翻译中至关重要；MT系统在特定用途语言（LSP）场景下表现不一且存在局限性。

Abstract: This article aims to evaluate the quality of machine translation (MT) and post-editing (PE) in the context of specialised translation from English into French. Three MT systems (DeepL, eTranslation and Systran) were compared, and two groups of post-editors -linguists/translators and NLP experts -were asked to perform post-editing. Translation assessment is based on error annotation using an error typology adapted to MT and PE evaluation. The results reveal significant differences between the three MT systems and the two groups of post-editors, particularly in terms of terminological accuracy and fluency. This study highlights the importance of domain knowledge in specialised translation, as well as the limitations and variable performance of MT systems in language for specific purposes (LSP).

</details>


### [379] [Have You Ever Seen Them? Entity-level Membership Inference through Interrogating Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23030)
*Yiran Zhu,Ziqi Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出实体级成员推断攻击，用于判断LLM是否在训练中接触过目标实体的相关信息。在仅标签的黑盒设定下，基于语义特征设计了五种询问策略，实验表明该方法AUC可达0.97，比基线方法平衡准确率提高6.0%-17.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有成员推断研究主要关注样本级别的训练记忆检测，但LLM可能不会逐字记忆某个样本，却能从分散的提及中积累并泄露实体知识。因此，作者类比人类记忆行为，提出实体级成员推断任务，探究能否像采访人类一样询问LLM以揭示其对实体信息的暴露程度。

Method: 在仅标签的黑盒设定下，形式化定义了任务在线索、输入和模型三个层面的约束，并推导了可行的充要条件。基于该形式化，设计了五种询问策略，利用有限实体线索构建提示，生成实体相关回复，并从生成文本的语义特征中推断成员关系。同时构建了实体级数据集，将现有样本级标签-only方法适配为基线。

Result: 在人物实体上的实验表明，所提方法AUC最高达0.97，平衡准确率比最优适配基线提升6.0%-17.5%。

Conclusion: 实体级成员推断是可行的，且显著优于适配的样本级方法，揭示了LLM在训练中暴露实体信息的风险，为隐私保护和版权合规评估提供了新视角。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) raise growing concerns about privacy leakage and copyright compliance. Membership inference is a key tool for assessing such risks, but existing studies mainly focus on whether specific samples or sample-based data units are used for training. We argue that LLMs exhibit a human-memory-like behavior: an LLM may not memorize a specific sample verbatim, yet it can accumulate and reveal knowledge about a real-world entity from scattered mentions. This analogy motivates us to examine whether an LLM can be interrogated like a human interviewee to reveal its exposure to entity-related information. Motivated by this question, we propose entity-level membership inference, which determines whether information related to a target entity is used in LLM training. We study this task in the practical label-only black-box setting, where only generated texts are observable. We formalize the task under clue, input, and model constraints, establish the necessary and sufficient conditions for its feasibility, and instantiate five interrogation strategies based on this formalization. The strategies use limited entity clues to construct prompts, elicit entity-related responses, and infer membership from semantic features among the generated texts. We construct entity-level datasets and adapt state-of-the-art sample-level label-only methods to the entity-level setting as baselines. Experiments on person entities show that our methods achieve AUC up to 0.97 and bring gains of 6.0%--17.5% in Balanced Accuracy over the best adapted baseline.

</details>


### [380] [Training Open Models for Agentic Phone Use](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23049)
*Zhengyang Tang,Xin Lai,Pengyuan Lyu,Xinyuan Wang,Tianyi Bai,Chenxin Li,Yiduo Guo,Huawen Shen,Yuxuan Liu,Junyi Li,Zhengyao Fang,Yang Ding,Yi Zhang,Weinong Wang,Xingran Zhou,Liang Wu,Fei Tang,Sunqi Fan,Shangpin Peng,Zheng Ruan,Anran Zhang,Benyou Wang,Ji-Rong Wen,Rui Yan,Chengquan Zhang,Han Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PhoneBuddy提出了一种结合真实应用环境和模拟应用环境（PhoneWorld）的训练方案，用于训练通用手机操作智能体。通过混合强化学习（Mixed RL），在150个真实手机任务上实现了45.33%的成功率，在AndroidWorld上达到83.2%，表明模拟环境是真实环境RL的互补而非替代。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实手机环境（真实设备运行真实应用）训练智能体存在速度慢、有状态、有副作用、难以重置和验证的问题，而可扩展的模拟环境只能近似真实行为。如何在两者间取得平衡，训练出可靠的手机操作模型是一个关键挑战。

Method: PhoneBuddy包含两个核心组件：1) PhoneWorld——从真实GUI使用结构中重建可运行的模拟应用环境；2) 训练流程：先在两个环境收集的轨迹上进行共享监督微调，然后对比纯真实环境RL与跨两种环境的混合RL。

Result: 在150个真实手机任务的人类评估中，任务成功率从SFT后的36.67%提升到纯真实RL的40.67%，再到混合RL的45.33%。在AndroidWorld上，从60.3%提升到77.2%再到83.2%。增益在应用内和小应用任务中最显著，跨应用长程工作流仍是开放挑战。

Conclusion: 模拟应用训练不是真实环境RL的替代品，而是可扩展、可重置、可自动检查的互补交互来源。混合RL策略优于单纯的真实环境RL。

Abstract: Phones are becoming an important execution surface for general-purpose agents, but training open models for reliable phone use remains difficult because the environment that matters at deployment, real devices running real apps, is slow, stateful, side-effectful, and hard to reset or verify, while scalable mock environments only approximate real behavior. We present PhoneBuddy, a training recipe and open-model line for agentic phone use that combines a real-app environment with a mock-app environment, PhoneWorld, which reconstructs runnable mock apps from real GUI usage structure. PhoneBuddy first builds a shared supervised fine-tuning stage from trajectories collected in both environments, then compares real-app RL against mixed RL across both environments. Across a 150-task human evaluation on real phones spanning apps, mini-apps, and cross-app workflows, task success rate improves from 36.67\% after supervised fine-tuning to 40.67\% after real-app RL and 45.33\% after mixed RL. On AndroidWorld, the same progression rises from 60.3\% to 77.2\% to 83.2\%. These results show that mock-app training is not a replacement for real-app RL, but a complementary source of scalable, resettable, and automatically checked interaction. The gains are strongest on app and mini-app tasks, while long-horizontal cross-app workflows remain an important open challenge.

</details>


### [381] [PIVOTSBench: Evaluating Fine-Grained Interpersonal Relationship Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23092)
*Shuxiang Zhang,Yiting Yin,Wenxuan Song,Yuhang Wu,Miao Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了PIVOTS基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型理解双向人际关系维度的能力，包含辅助任务和消融研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类天生具备理解细粒度人际关系的能力，但现有的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在这一领域的研究仍属空白。

Method: 从Social-IQ 2.0和YouTube数据构建PIVOTS基准，包含双向人际关系维度预测任务和辅助任务（识别关键视觉线索），评估了多种开源和闭源MLLMs，并进行了消融研究分析视觉模态和社交角色信息的影响。

Result: 评估了多种MLLMs，通过消融研究分析了视觉模态和显式社交角色信息的影响，以及联合预测和成对预测设置对评分的影响。

Conclusion: PIVOTS填补了MLLMs在细粒度人际关系理解方面的评估空白，揭示了当前模型在该任务上的能力局限。

Abstract: Humans possess an innate ability to understand fine-grained interpersonal relationships, which is central to everyday social interactions. Although such reasoning is inherently multimodal, it remains largely unexplored by existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs). To address this gap, we introduce PIVOTS, the first benchmark built from Social-IQ 2.0 and YouTube data to evaluate MLLMs' ability to predict bidirectional interpersonal relationship dimensions grounded in established psychology research. In addition, PIVOTS includes auxiliary tasks that assess models' ability to identify and leverage the critical visual cues underlying such predictions. We evaluate both proprietary and open-source MLLMs and conduct detailed ablation studies to analyze the effects of visual modalities and explicit social role information in conversational utterances. We further examine how joint and pairwise prediction settings benefit MLLMs in scoring bidirectional PIVOTS dimensions. Project page and resources: https://flynnzhangsx.github.io/PIVOTSBench/ .

</details>


### [382] [A Dual-Track Framework for Template-Constrained LaTeX Conversion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23107)
*Chung Cheuk Hei,Liu Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种双轨框架，将模板格式化与文档处理解耦，通过离线提取模板约束和在线混合执行（LLM处理语义密集型任务，规则引擎处理确定性任务），在7个LaTeX模板和56篇论文上实现了更好的结构保真度和编译成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法中，基于规则的转换器无法正确处理资源插入和模板特定约束，而纯端到端LLM生成则容易导致语义漂移和难以调试的幻觉问题。

Method: 双轨框架：离线轨道将模板约束提取为可复用清单；在线轨道采用混合执行流水线，将LLM限制用于语义元数据、文献引用和复杂视觉/表格布局等推理密集型组件，而确定性处理则委托给规则引擎。

Result: 在7个LaTeX模板和56篇已发表研究论文上，该方法相比基线方法保持了更好的结构保真度，满足了多样的布局约束，并实现了更高的编译成功率。

Conclusion: 将LLM与规则引擎有机结合的双轨框架能够有效克服纯规则方法和纯LLM方法的局限性，在结构化文档转换任务中取得更优性能。

Abstract: With the increasing demands for advanced document conversion, mapping structured Markdown drafts into template-compliant formats like LaTeX remains a challenge. Existing approaches largely depend on either deterministic rule-based converters or pure end-to-end Large Language Model (LLM) generation. The former fails to correctly handle asset insertions and template-specific constraints, while the latter tends to induce semantic drift, leading to hallucinations that are difficult to debug. To address these limitations, we introduce a robust Dual-Track Framework that systematically decouples template formatting from document processing: an offline track extracts template constraints into a reusable manifest, while an online track implements a hybrid execution pipeline. This pipeline confines LLM usage exclusively to reasoning-intensive components (e.g., semantic metadata, bibliographic references, and complex visual/tabular layouts) while delegating rule-based engines for deterministic processing. Empirical evaluation across 7 LaTeX templates and 56 published research papers demonstrates that our method preserves better structural fidelity, satisfies diverse layout constraints, and achieves a higher compilation success rate compared to the previous baselines.

</details>


### [383] [PRIDE: Privileged Information-enhanced Distillation for Empathetic Dialogue Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23124)
*Jiaqiang Wu,Zhouan Zhu,Shangfei Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出PRIDE方法，利用特权信息（训练时可用、推理时不可用）进行知识蒸馏，让轻量级学生模型在共情对话生成中达到甚至超越大模型的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在共情对话中表现出色但计算开销巨大，难以部署在资源受限环境；现有知识蒸馏方法未能有效迁移共情所需的细微理解和隐式上下文线索。

Method: PRIDE包含三个核心组件：(1) 共情推理提示，引导教师模型显式分解共情过程为理解情感和分析情境；(2) 多源注意力机制，使学生模型有效整合特权信息；(3) 双对齐损失，结合反向KL散度和最大均值差异，在logit和特征层面实现鲁棒知识迁移。

Result: 在多模态和纯文本数据集上的实验表明，PRIDE达到了有竞争力的性能，在某些情况下甚至匹配或超越更大的教师模型在准确性和语义相关性方面的表现。

Conclusion: 利用训练阶段特有的特权信息进行知识蒸馏，可以有效弥补小模型在共情能力上的不足，实现资源受限环境下的高质量共情对话生成。

Abstract: Large language models have demonstrated significant capabilities in generating diverse and context-aware responses for empathetic dialogue. However, their computational demands severely limit their deployment in resource-constrained environments. While knowledge distillation offers a promising compression solution, it often fails to transfer the nuanced understanding essential for empathy, as it overlooks the implicit contextual cues that guide human connection. To bridge this gap, we propose a \textbf{pr}ivileged \textbf{i}nformation-enhanced knowledge \textbf{d}istillation method for \textbf{e}mpathetic dialogue generation (PRIDE). Our method leverages privileged information, such as expert psychological annotations or future event summaries, which is available exclusively during training but unavailable at inference time. This allows us to transfer the teacher model's empathetic reasoning to smaller models without relying on extra inputs during deployment. Specifically, PRIDE has three key components: (1) An empathy-reasoning prompt that guides the teacher to explicitly decompose the empathetic process into understanding feelings and analyzing situations step-by-step; (2) A multi-source attention mechanism that directs the student to effectively integrate privileged information; (3) A dual-alignment loss that combines reversed Kullback-Leibler divergence and maximum mean discrepancy to ensure robust knowledge transfer at both logit and feature levels. Experiments on multi-modal and text-only datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance, and in some cases matches or even surpasses larger teacher models in terms of accuracy and semantic relevance.

</details>


### [384] [Same question, different history: language, national identity, and credit in large language models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23164)
*William Guey,Pierrick Bougault,Wei Zhang,Vitor D. de Moura,José O. Gomes*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 大型语言模型在不同语言查询下会系统性偏向不同国家版本的发明归属争议，语言如同开关激活不同的国族记忆，形成一种计算性的平庸民族主义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大型语言模型在涉及跨国有争议的发明归属问题时，查询语言是否以及如何影响模型给出的答案，揭示语言在塑造技术史叙事中的作用。

Method: 对11种主流大语言模型，针对21项有争议的发明发现，使用12种语言进行查询，共收集75,896条回复，并控制回复长度、模型差异、历史知名度和国家纪念程度等变量进行分析。

Result: 模型普遍承认发明归属存在争议，但查询语言系统性影响哪一方被呈现。地位较低的发明主张者在使用其关联语言提问时更可能出现，而占主导地位的英语世界人物在不同语言下保持稳定。

Conclusion: 语言充当了激活不同国族历史版本的开关，大语言模型作为文化记忆的分布式系统，其语言条件决定了哪些历史叙事变得可见，构成了计算形式的平庸民族主义。

Abstract: Who invented the radio, Russia's Alexander Popov or Italy's Guglielmo Marconi? Was the telephone the achievement of Bell in the United States or Meucci in Italy? Does printing belong to China's Bi Sheng or Germany's Gutenberg? The answer depends not only on historical record but also on language and perspective.
  We analyse eleven widely used large language models across 21 disputed inventions and discoveries, evaluated in twelve languages and 75,896 responses. While models generally acknowledge that credit is contested, query language systematically affects which claimant is surfaced. Lower-status claimants are more likely to appear when questions are asked in their associated language, whereas dominant Anglophone figures remain stable across languages.
  These patterns persist after controlling for response length, model differences, historical prominence, and levels of national commemoration. Language thus acts as a switch that activates different national versions of the same history, producing systematically different national memories from the same question.
  We interpret this as evidence that large language models function as distributed systems of cultural memory, where language conditions which histories become visible, contributing to a computational form of banal nationalism.

</details>


### [385] [When Does Intrinsic Self-Correction Help? A Task-Sensitive Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23196)
*Elroy Stav,Dvir Berlowitz,Maayan Orner,Sarit Kraus*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出任务敏感视角下的内在自我修正，发现其在特定任务结构（约束验证、复杂推理、策略二次判断）中可带来稳定性能提升，表明SC应视为任务依赖的推理时策略而非普适性改进方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近期研究表明大语言模型的内在自我修正（Intrinsic SC）不可靠，模型难以判断自身初始回答是否正确。作者希望探究SC在不同任务中的差异性表现，而非笼统回答"SC是否有效"。

Method: 采用任务敏感视角，将SC机制划分为三类：验证显式约束、重新审视复杂推理过程、在文字游戏任务中提供竞争策略的二次判断。在多基准和多模型上进行实验验证。

Result: 当底层任务结构有利于上述三种修正模式时，SC能够带来一致的性能提升；否则效果不稳定。

Conclusion: 内在自我修正的最佳理解方式是将其视为一种任务依赖的推理时策略，其有效性取决于修正阶段在给定任务中能发挥的作用，而非一种统一的、可靠的初始输出改进方法。

Abstract: Intrinsic self-correction (SC) aims to improve large language model outputs by prompting a model to revisit its own initial answer without external feedback. Recent studies have questioned the reliability of this approach, showing that models often struggle to judge whether their initial responses are correct. In this work, we take a task-sensitive view of SC. Rather than asking whether it works in general, we examine settings where SC may operate through different mechanisms: verifying explicit constraints, revisiting a complex reasoning process, or providing a second opinion over competing strategies in word-game tasks. Across multiple benchmarks and models, we find that SC can yield consistent performance gains when the underlying task structure facilitates these modes of revision. These results suggest that SC is best understood as a task-dependent inference-time strategy whose usefulness depends on the role the revision stage can play in a given task, rather than as a uniformly reliable method for improving initial model outputs.

</details>


### [386] [MuPPET: A Benchmark for Contextual Privacy of LLM Assistants in Multi-Party Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23217)
*Elena Sofia Ruzzetti,Cornelius Emde,Sangdoo Yun,Seong Joon Oh,Martin Gubri*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MuPPET基准测试揭示LLM代理在多用户场景下的隐私泄露风险远高于一对一环境，现有防御措施效果有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文隐私基准仅考虑单对话者场景，未衡量多方对话中的隐私风险。多用户环境下，代理同时向所有群成员披露信息，隐私控制难度显著增加。

Method: 提出MuPPET（Multi-Party Privacy Exposure Testing）基准，专门用于评估多轮多方对话中的上下文隐私泄露风险。

Result: 实验表明：1）多用户设置下隐私泄露远高于一对一评估结果；2）前沿模型存在漏洞，小型开源模型（常用于本地敏感数据部署）更脆弱；3）现有上下文隐私防御仅提供部分保护，并会降低实用性。

Conclusion: 现有防御无法解决根本的party-tracking问题（即准确追踪信息应向哪些参与者公开），需要开发新的多方隐私保护机制。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly deployed in multi-party environments, handling sensitive personal data on behalf of individual users, for instance in group chats. When such an agent discloses private information, it reaches every group member at once. This risk is structurally harder to control than in one-to-one settings, as every piece of private information must be appropriate for every recipient in the group. Yet all existing contextual privacy benchmarks consider only single-interlocutor settings, leaving multi-party privacy risks unmeasured. We introduce MuPPET (Multi-Party Privacy Exposure Testing), a benchmark for contextual privacy in multi-party conversations. Our experiments show that models leak substantially more in multi-party settings than one-to-one evaluations suggest. Frontier models are vulnerable, and smaller open-weights models, often preferred for local deployment with sensitive data, even more so. Existing contextual privacy defences offer only partial protection, degrade utility, and do not resolve the underlying party-tracking problem.

</details>


### [387] [Judgment-Grounded Expansion for Peer Review Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23233)
*Sheng Lu,Lizhen Qu,Iryna Gurevych*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出"判断-扩展"（judgment-grounded expansion）的人机协作模式，用于自动生成论文评审意见。该模式由评审者提供评价性声明，系统将其扩展为评审意见候选。作者通过结构化生成-检查-精炼流程、用户研究和共形预测等方法，解决了可扩展评估和候选集管理两大挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端自动评审生成缺乏可问责性，不适合需要人工负责的场景。为了在自动化与问责之间取得更好的平衡，作者提出人机协作的"判断-扩展"模式，让评审者提供核心评价判断，系统负责扩展为完整评审意见。

Method: 1) 将任务形式化为"生成-检查-精炼"的结构化流程；2) 开展用户研究收集人机交互数据；3) 设计模拟流程以实现大规模可扩展评估；4) 应用共形预测（conformal prediction）来平衡候选集大小与目标覆盖率。

Result: 建立了"判断-扩展"作为具体任务的定义；证明了共形预测能有效平衡候选评审意见集合的大小和覆盖率需求；提供了大规模评估的模拟方法。

Conclusion: 该工作为未来协作式评审生成系统的设计提供了经验和方法的 foundation，确立了"判断-扩展"这一人机协作任务的具体框架。

Abstract: Automatic review generation is a promising direction for accelerating scientific progress. While most work adopts an end-to-end setup, its fully automated nature makes it less suitable for settings that demand accountability. To better balance automation and accountability, we formalize judgment-grounded expansion, a human-AI collaboration mode where a reviewer provides an evaluative claim and the system expands it into review comment candidate(s). We model it as a structured generate-check-refine process and conduct a user study to collect human-model interaction data. We study two practical challenges for judgment-grounded expansion: scalable evaluation and candidate set curation. We develop methods to simulate the process for large-scale evaluation, and show that conformal prediction is well suited to balancing candidate set size and target coverage. Our work establishes judgment-grounded expansion as a concrete task and provides empirical and methodological foundations for the design of future collaborative review generation systems.

</details>


### [388] [Scaling LLM Knowledge Boundaries via Distribution-Optimized Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23271)
*Songze Li,Yarong Lan,Zhongpu Bo,Zhaoyang Wang,Zhiqiang Liu,Yuan Yuan,Chengtao Gan,Menghao Qian,Enpei Niu,Xiaoke Guo,Yuanxiang Liu,Zhaoyan Gong,Xiangjin Hu,Liangyurui Liu,Jingdian Lu,Lei Liang,Jun Zhou,Huajun Chen,Wen Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出KDoS框架，通过知识密度驱动的三阶段反馈机制优化合成数据的知识分布，发现存在最优知识分布能最大化LLM知识边界扩展，该分布在不同模型和规模下保持稳定，并在六个知识基准上超越基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前知识注入方法仅依赖预设token数量或固定数据比例进行合成，缺乏对知识分布的感知，导致某些领域稀疏而另一些领域冗余，限制了LLM的知识边界扩展。

Method: 提出KDoS框架，引入知识密度概念，通过三阶段反馈机制驱动合成过程，从盲目生成转向分布优化合成。基于Wikipedia构建不同知识分布的合成数据，在0.6B至16B多种模型（Qwen、Ling、LLaMA）和1B至5B tokens数据规模上进行实验。

Result: (1)存在最优知识分布能一致地最大化知识边界扩展；(2)该分布在不同骨干网络和规模下保持稳定；(3)KDoS在六个知识基准上优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 为合成数据驱动的知识注入提供了新的视角和实用框架，验证了从分布角度优化知识注入的有效性。

Abstract: Knowledge injection via synthetic data is crucial for enhancing Large Language Models (LLMs). However, current synthesis methods simply stop at preset token counts or fixed data ratios, lacking awareness of knowledge distribution. This results in some domains being sparse while others are redundant, limiting LLM knowledge boundaries. We revisit knowledge injection from a distribution perspective and hypothesize that an optimal knowledge distribution exists to maximize knowledge boundary expansion. We propose KDoS (Knowledge Distribution-optimized Synthesis), a framework that introduces knowledge density to drive synthesis through a three-stage feedback mechanism, shifting from blind generation to distribution-optimized synthesis. We construct Wikipedia-based synthetic data with varying knowledge distributions and conduct experiments on models from 0.6B to 16B (Qwen, Ling, LLaMA) and data scales from 1B to 5B tokens. Our key findings are: (1) an optimal knowledge distribution consistently maximizes boundary expansion; (2) this distribution is stable across backbones and scales; (3) KDoS outperforms baselines across six knowledge benchmarks. Our work offers a new perspective and practical framework for synthetic data-driven knowledge injection.

</details>


### [389] [Towards Root Memories: Benchmarking and Enhancing Implicit Logical Memory Retrieval for Personalized LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23283)
*Hongxun Ding,Xiang Yu,Chengbing Wang,Jianfei Xiao,Keqin Bao,Wenjie Wang,Xiangnan He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出首个隐式逻辑记忆检索基准IMLogic，并设计RootMem框架，通过结构化根记忆提取用户历史中的个性化决策逻辑，与语义检索互补，显著提升长对话场景下的记忆检索准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM记忆系统中的检索方法仅依赖语义相似度，会遗漏语义重叠少但逻辑关键的记忆，而当前基准无法有效评估这一问题。

Method: 构建IMLogic基准数据集；提出根记忆（root memory）这一结构化、保留决策逻辑的表示形式；设计RootMem框架，先蒸馏原始历史为根记忆，再通过基于LLM的路由器激活逻辑相关的记忆。

Result: RootMem显著优于最强检索基线，并能持续提升现有记忆代理的准确率。

Conclusion: 隐式逻辑检索对个性化LLM记忆系统至关重要，RootMem框架通过结构化逻辑表示有效补充了语义检索的不足。

Abstract: Memory systems are essential for personalized Large Language Models (LLMs). However, existing retrieval methods in these systems primarily rely on semantic similarity, potentially missing logically critical memories with limited semantic overlap. Current benchmarks remain inadequate for evaluating this problem. To address this gap, we construct IMLogic, the first high-quality benchmark targeting implicit logical memory retrieval in long-dialogue scenarios. Motivated by this challenge, we introduce root memory, a structured, decision-preserving representation that distills reusable personalized logic from long-term user histories. We then propose RootMem, a plug-and-play framework that first distills raw histories into structured root memories and then uses an LLM-based router to activate logically relevant ones, complementing semantic retrieval with personalized decision logic. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RootMem significantly outperforms the strongest retrieval baselines and consistently boosts the accuracy of existing memory agents. Our benchmark and codes will be available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/IMLogic-DBB3.

</details>


### [390] [On the Effect of Segmentation Width and Cluster Size on Speech Resynthesis and Continuation in Generative Spoken Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23285)
*Shunsuke Kando,Wataru Nakata,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Yusuke Miyao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究生成式口语语言建模（GSLM）在不同比特率离散语音表示下的语音合成与续接性能，发现较低比特率即可生成清晰自然的语音，且续接质量稳定，表明传统GSLM设置存在冗余性；同时指出LLM评估指标虽优于传统指标但与人类主观评分相关性仍较低，需更稳定的自动评估方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索GSLM在不同比特率离散语音表示下的语音合成与续接性能，验证传统GSLM设置是否存在冗余性，并评估现有自动评估指标的有效性。

Method: 使用固定宽度对语音表示进行分段，训练不同聚类规模的K-means模型以生成多种比特率设置，对比不同比特率下语音合成与续接的质量。

Result: 较低比特率即可合成清晰自然的语音；较低比特率下语音续接质量在多指标上保持稳定；LLM基指标与人类主观评分的相关性高于传统指标，但整体仍较低。

Conclusion: 传统GSLM设置可能对有效语音生成存在冗余性；当前自动评估方法仍需改进以获得更稳定的评估结果。

Abstract: Generative Spoken Language Modeling (GSLM) enables text-free speech modeling by training language models (LMs) using discrete speech representations instead of textual transcription. In this paper, we investigate the performance of GSLM on speech synthesis and continuation using discrete speech representations with varying bitrates. We segment speech representations with fixed widths and train K-means models in multiple cluster sizes, resulting in various bitrate settings. We demonstrate that intelligible and natural speech can be synthesized at lower bitrate settings than the baseline. Furthermore, speech continuation quality remains stable at lower bitrates across multiple metrics, suggesting that the conventional GSLM setting may be redundant for effective speech generation. Although LLM-based metrics show higher correlation with human subjective score than conventional metrics, it remains low, highlighting the need for more stable automatic evaluation methods.

</details>


### [391] [The Anatomy of the CTC Oracle Gap: Acoustic Exhaustion and Linguistic Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23306)
*Ivan Novosad*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统性地证明了CTC内部表征的判别能力存在信息瓶颈：当N-best候选集增大时，CTC内部的声学评分与WER的相关性显著下降（G=4到G=128时Spearman ρ从-0.574降至-0.270，损失53%），导致11种CTC内部评分策略在G=16时均无统计学显著的WER改进。瓶颈的本质是语言层面的，而非声学层面——通过MBR解码引入RoBERTa的语言模型后，在LibriSpeech test-other上实现5.42% WER（相对改善9.0%），且RoBERTa的相关性仅下降21%。此外，标准MWER训练在近收敛检查点上完全失效（CR-CTC上WER恶化+6.18至+8.90个百分点），原因是训练Oracle差距仅0.007 pp，无法提供有效奖励信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究CTC内部评分在N-best假设选择中的极限，定位声学置信度与语言合理性之间的信息瓶颈，并验证该瓶颈的本质是语言层面而非声学层面。

Method: 系统性地对比11种CTC内部评分策略和声学特征评分策略在不同N-best大小下的表现；使用Spearman相关系数衡量假设评分与逐句WER的判别能力；引入基于RoBERTa伪对数似然（PLL）后验的MBR解码作为外部语言信息注入手段；在多种架构（Zipformer）、领域和噪声条件下验证泛化性；分析MWER训练的方差特性及在近收敛状态下的失效机制。

Result: 11种CTC内部评分在G=16时均无统计显著改进；CTC的Spearman ρ随G增大从-0.574降至-0.270（损失53%）；MBR-CER解码使用RoBERTa PLL（τ=10, G=128）在LibriSpeech test-other上实现5.42% WER（相对9.0%改善，p<0.0001），RoBERTa的ρ仅下降21%；在11/13条件下获得显著增益；所有MWER配置在CR-CTC近收敛检查点上导致WER恶化+6.18至+8.90 pp。

Conclusion: CTC内部表征的判别能力已饱和，声学信号的任何重组都无法缩小Oracle差距；信息瓶颈在语言层面，需借助外部语言模型突破；标准MWER训练在近收敛检查点上因Oracle差距过小而失效。

Abstract: We study the limits of CTC-internal scoring for N-best hypothesis selection and locate the information bottleneck separating acoustic confidence from linguistic plausibility. Eleven CTC-internal and acoustic-feature scoring strategies produce no statistically significant WER improvement over greedy decoding on LibriSpeech dev-other at G=16 (all p > 0.05). The exhaustion is systematic: CTC's Spearman $ρ$ between hypothesis score and per-utterance WER degrades from -0.574 at G=4 to -0.270 at G=128, a 53% loss driven by blank-path proliferation. This establishes that the discriminative capacity of CTC-internal representations is saturated: no recombination of acoustic signals can close the oracle gap.
  Confirming that the bottleneck is linguistic, not acoustic, external linguistic information introduced via MBR decoding breaks through it. MBR-CER decoding with a RoBERTa pseudo-log-likelihood (PLL) posterior ($τ$=10, G=128) achieves 5.42% WER on held-out LibriSpeech test-other (greedy 5.96%, $Δ$=-0.535 pp, p<0.0001, 9.0% relative). RoBERTa PLL $ρ$ degrades only 21% over the same range, retaining discriminating power where CTC loses it. Applied without retuning across two Zipformer architectures, three domains (LibriSpeech, TED-LIUM 3, VoxPopuli), and four MUSAN noise levels, the recipe gives significant gains in 11 of 13 conditions.
  On the training side, standard MWER training via the CTC forward-backward algorithm implements Rao-Blackwellized REINFORCE at the output projection (variance about 3x below Viterbi). Yet sequence-level fine-tuning fails at near-converged checkpoints: all four MWER configurations on CR-CTC collapse (+6.18 to +8.90 pp WER), as a training oracle gap of 0.007 pp provides no usable reward signal.

</details>


### [392] [Tmax: A simple recipe for terminal agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23321)
*Hamish Ivison,Junjie Oscar Yin,Rulin Shao,Teng Xiao,Nathan Lambert,Hannaneh Hajishirzi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Tmax 是一种针对终端智能体的强化学习训练方法，通过新颖的数据生成分类学（结合难度控制、角色设定和验证器多样化）构建了超过2.5倍于之前规模的数据集，仅用9B参数模型就在Terminal-Bench 2.0上达到27%的得分，超越了此前更大的模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管终端智能体已成为语言模型最流行的下游应用，但学术界对基于强化学习训练这类模型的研究相对较少，主要受限于困难的基准测试、数据缺乏以及缺少简单基线方法。

Method: 提出一种新颖的数据生成分类学，结合难度控制、角色设定(personas)和验证器多样化，低成本生成大量终端环境数据用于RL和SFT训练；采用简单的、仅基于结果(outcome-only)的RL训练方案。

Result: 仅使用9B参数模型，在Terminal-Bench 2.0上达到27%的准确率，超越此前工作中更大的模型；构建并开源了超过此前2.5倍规模的终端智能体数据集。

Conclusion: Tmax 是目前最强的开源终端智能体RL训练方案，为未来学术研究提供了强大的基线，拉近了开源数据方案与前沿水平的差距。

Abstract: Terminal-using agents have quickly become the most popular downstream application of language models (LMs). Despite their prevalence, relatively little academic work has examined RL-based training of these models, likely due to difficult benchmarks, a lack of data, and a lack of simple baseline recipes. We present Tmax, the strongest open RL recipe for terminal agents to date, bringing open data recipes closer to the frontier. While simple, our recipe achieves 27\% on Terminal-Bench 2.0 with only 9B parameters, outperforming much larger models from prior work. Concretely, we generate data using a novel taxonomy, combining difficulty control, personas, and verifier diversification, which allows us to cheaply generate large amounts of terminal environments for RL and SFT training. We open-source our terminal dataset, which is over 2.5x larger than previously released terminal-agent datasets. We then train open-weight models using RL with our data, using a simple, outcome-only recipe. We release our data, models, and code as a strong baseline for future open academic work on terminal agents at https://github.com/hamishivi/tmax.

</details>


### [393] [WaveDetect: Robust Framework for Machine-Generated Text Detection via Wavelet Transform](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23336)
*Zhichen Liu,Kaitong Qin,Linhan He,Yang Xu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出WaveDetect框架，将LLM生成文本检测转化为时频域信号处理任务，通过连续小波变换提取机器文本的"频谱指纹"，在RAID、EvoBench和Domain-Shift数据集上达到SOTA，对对抗扰动、跨域偏移和模型演化具有强鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM生成文本检测方法在面对对抗扰动、跨域偏移和基础模型快速演化三个关键挑战时表现不佳，亟需更鲁棒的检测范式。

Method: 将生成文本建模为概率信号，应用可微连续小波变换将时域概率信号转换为可学习的频谱表示，从而揭示机器文本中时域不可见的固有"频谱指纹"。

Result: 在RAID、EvoBench和Domain-Shift三个精心构建的数据集上达到SOTA性能，在对抗攻击下具有强鲁棒性，能泛化到分布外主题和未见过的演化后LLM。

Conclusion: 频谱分析可作为LLM生成文本检测的有效新范式，通过揭示时域不可见的频谱特征从根本上提升检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Abstract: As Large Language Models asymptotically approach human-level fluency in natural language generation, solely relying on surface-level semantic artifacts for detecting LLM-generated texts has become increasingly precarious. Existing detectors often falter when facing three critical challenges: adversarial perturbations, cross-domain shifts, and the rapid temporal evolution of the foundation model. To address these issues, we propose \wavedetect, a novel framework that reformulates text detection as a signal processing task within the time-frequency domain. Unlike previous methods that analyze static token probability distributions, \wavedetect models the generated output as a probability signal, upon which a differentiable Continuous Wavelet Transform is applied to convert them into learnable spectral representations. This process reveals the intrinsic ``spectral fingerprints'' in machine-generated texts--patterns that remain invisible in time domain. Comprehensive evaluations on three well-curated datasets (RAID, EvoBench, and Domain-Shift) show that our method achieves a new state-of-the-art. It not only achieves superior accuracy but also exhibits remarkable robustness against sophisticated attacks, generalization across out-of-distribution topics and unseen evolving LLMs. Our results validate the efficacy of spectral analysis as a promising paradigm for LLM-generated texts detection.

</details>


### [394] [Measuring & Mitigating Over-Alignment for LLMs in Multilingual Criminal Law Courts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23375)
*Arthur Wuhrmann,Gaetan Stein,Daniel Brunner,Andrei Kucharavy*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对瑞士联邦最高法院在使用小型本地LLM处理刑事法律文本时遇到的过度对齐（over-alignment）问题，构建了TF-RefusalBench多语言基准数据集，系统评估了模型因内容安全护栏导致的任务拒绝现象，并探索了提示优化和abliteration（拒绝方向消融）等缓解方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 刑事法律文本（如判决书）常包含暴力和性犯罪的详细描述，这类内容触发了LLM的安全护栏（过度对齐），导致模型拒绝处理或产生免责声明，妨碍了法律从业者的正常工作。现有研究缺乏对这一特定领域和任务场景的系统量化评估。

Method: 从瑞士联邦最高法院公开判决中构建TF-RefusalBench多语言基准（含法语、德语、意大利语、英语共5,200条提示），涵盖翻译和摘要两类任务，专门设计易触发拒绝的提示和段落。使用该基准评估多种模型，分析过度对齐的多维度影响因素（模型本身、提示语言、文本语言），并测试提示工程和abliteration（消融模型拒绝方向）两种缓解策略。

Result: 1) 过度对齐是多维度现象，受模型、提示语言和文本语言共同影响；2) 仅从过度拒绝率角度评估不足以全面衡量其影响，因为免责声明会损害任务忠诚度（task faithfulness）；3) 提示工程可部分缓解，而abliteration几乎完全消除拒绝行为，且对任务性能影响极小。

Conclusion: 对于刑事法律等高风险领域，LLM的过度对齐会严重限制其窄用途的可行性；abliteration是一种有效的去护栏手段，能在不影响任务质量的前提下消除拒绝行为，为本地部署的刑事法律AI应用提供了可行路径。

Abstract: While the wider applicability of LLMs in the legal field is currently debated due to their reliability and the gravity of any errors, narrow uses with well-understood and mitigated risks have emerged. Notably the Swiss Federal Supreme Court uses small on-premises models for tentative translations and short-passage summarization across the four official languages. However, such usage is challenging in the context of Criminal Law. Since rulings and cases employees work on routinely can contain detailed descriptions of violent and sexual offenses, their legitimate work is compromised by refusals and disclaimers due to the activation of model guardrails (over-alignment).
  To measure this phenomenon, we introduce TF-RefusalBench, a multilingual benchmark for criminal-law translation and summarization derived from public Swiss Supreme Court rulings. TF-RefusalBench contains 5,200 total prompts across French, German, Italian, and English, corresponding to common task prompts and passages likely to trigger refusal. We then use TF-RefusalBench to show that over-alignment is a multifaceted phenomenon, influenced by the model and the prompt and text languages being processed, and that its impact cannot be evaluated solely from an over-refusal perspective, given the disclaimer's impact on task faithfulness. Finally, we evaluate approaches to enable on-premises LLMs for Criminal Law Tasks, demonstrating that while prompting can be effective, abliteration (refusal directions ablation) eliminates refusal with minimal impact on task performance.

</details>


### [395] [Energy-Based Transformers as Predictors of Reading Difficulty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23382)
*Jakub Dotlacil,Ece Takmaz*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次探索能量基Transformer度量（energy measure）在计算心理语言学中的应用，发现该度量能稳健预测阅读时间，并在多个语料库中超越surprisal的拟合效果，可能作为统一预测因子替代以往多个互补指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将能量基Transformer（与Hopfield网络和密集联想记忆模型存在原理性形式联系）引入句子处理研究，探索其作为阅读难度预测因子的有效性，以期弥合语言处理研究与更广泛的联想记忆文献之间的联系。

Method: 在三个阅读时间语料库（Natural Stories、UCL眼动追踪、UCL自定步速阅读）上，将能量度量作为阅读时间的预测因子进行回归分析，并与surprisal进行对比；在关系从句加工的受控实验中，检验单层能量能否捕捉主/宾语关系从句的不对称性。

Result: 能量度量在所有三个语料库中均为阅读时间的稳健预测因子，且显著优于surprisal；在关系从句实验中，单层能量即可捕捉到已知的主/宾语不对称性；能量度量能吸收注意力熵和surprisal的效应。

Conclusion: 能量度量可能作为一个统一的预测因子，替代以往需要多个互补指标（如surprisal和注意力熵）才能捕捉的加工负荷信息，为计算心理语言学提供了新的理论工具。

Abstract: Transformer language models have become established tools for modeling human sentence processing, with measures such as surprisal and attention entropy serving as effective predictors of reading difficulty that together capture complementary aspects of processing load. Here, we explore a related class of transformer models: energy-based transformers, which provide a principled formal link to associative memory models, bringing processing research into direct contact with the broader literature on Hopfield networks and dense associative memory. To our knowledge, this is the first exploration of an energy-based transformer measure in computational psycholinguistics. Across reading-time corpora (Natural Stories, UCL eye-tracking, UCL self-paced reading), the energy measure is a robust predictor of reading times, providing significant fit beyond surprisal in all three. In a controlled experiment on relative clause processing, energy at a single layer captures the well-known object/subject asymmetry. We find evidence that it subsumes effects attributable to both attention entropy and surprisal, suggesting that energy may serve as a single unified predictor where multiple complementary measures have previously been required.

</details>


### [396] [Self-Stigma Is Not a Monolith, but Generic Empathy Is: Persona-Conditioned LLM Support for People Who Use Drugs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23387)
*Layla Bouzoubaa,Rezvaneh Rezapour*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于人格感知的LLM支持方法，通过对Reddit上1,174名自我污名表达者进行潜在剖面分析，识别出四种自我污名人格类型。研究证明序列贝叶斯和循环神经网络分类器能有效从有限发帖历史中恢复这些人格类型，但临床专家评估发现，人格匹配的回应虽能实现行为改变，却不如通用共情回应受欢迎，提示评估LLM污名支持时需要区分整体共情判断与临床对齐的回应设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自我污名会导致药物使用者的治疗回避和脱离，但现有对话系统将自我污名表达视为统一信号处理，缺乏对污名表达个体差异的细粒度理解，需要一种人格感知的方法来提供个性化支持。

Method: 采用三阶段概念验证研究：(1) 对Reddit上1,174名自我污名表达者进行潜在剖面分析(LPA)以识别污名人格类型；(2) 使用序列贝叶斯和循环神经网络分类器从有限发帖历史中恢复人格类型；(3) 通过八名临床专家评估三种当代LLM的人格匹配回应效果。

Result: 识别出四种自我污名人格类型；序列分类器在30条帖子下达到macro-F1=0.74，显著优于批量和少样本LLM基线；人格匹配回应成功实现目标行为改变，但临床专家整体上偏好人格中性基线的通用共情回应。

Conclusion: 整体共情判断与临床对齐的回应设计可能存在矛盾，评估LLM污名支持需要能分解这两者的评价体系。

Abstract: Self-stigma predicts treatment avoidance and disengagement among people who use drugs (PWUD), yet conversational systems aiming to provide support typically treat self-stigma expression as a uniform signal. We present a three-phase, proof-of-concept study of a persona-aware approach to LLM support. Latent Profile Analysis (LPA) on indicator-level features from 1,174 self-stigma expressors on Reddit yields a four-persona typology validated against held-out behavioral and linguistic features. Sequential Bayesian and recurrent neural classifiers recover these personas from limited posting histories, substantially outperforming batch and few-shot LLM baselines (macro-F1 = 0.74 at 30 posts). Evaluation by eight clinical experts across three contemporary LLMs revealed a misalignment: persona-matched responses successfully achieved targeted behavioral shifts, yet raters holistically preferred the generic empathy of the persona-neutral baseline. Our findings suggest that holistic empathy judgments and clinically-aligned response design can pull in opposite directions, and that evaluating LLM-based stigma support requires rubrics capable of decomposing the two.

</details>


### [397] [Do LLM Embedding Spaces Recover Expert Structure?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23394)
*Yixuan Zhu,Zhenke Duan,Fanghen Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究预训练文本嵌入能否恢复心理健康语言中专家定义的症状类别结构。使用28个Reddit社区和Qwen3模型（0.6B/4B），通过表征相似性分析、原型典型性和多基线混淆控制，发现预训练嵌入与专家结构存在可测对齐，微调增强细粒度对齐，模型规模提升零样本和微调效果，且残差对齐在控制多种混淆后仍显著。结论：LLM嵌入可恢复专家相关类别几何，但具有层级依赖性，需显式测试混淆因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练文本嵌入的高类别可分性并不保证其几何结构能恢复专家定义的结构，尤其在心理健康语言中，症状关系提供了外部参考，但在线社区引入了领域、情感、风格和话语等多重混淆因素。需要系统评估嵌入空间与专家知识结构的一致程度。
