We demonstrate complex, two-way interactions between deformable 3DGS assets, standard CG assets such as fluids and meshes, and large-scale captured static environments, showcasing realistic coupled phenomena that were previously unattainable.

</details>


### [433] [Single-Event Upsets in 3D Gaussian Splatting Rendering: Bit-Level Criticality, Spatial Extent, and a Parallel Support Guard](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21791)
*Faruk Alpay,Baris Basaran*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文针对3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在易受瞬态故障硬件（如太空处理器、机器人边缘设备）上部署时的单粒子翻转（SEU）问题，提出了基于IEEE-754浮点布局的扰动界分析和一种轻量级支持守卫（support guard）防御方法。通过超过380万次GPU级故障注入实验，发现大部分比特翻转影响微小，但少量高阶位（尤其符号位）可导致单个高斯基元放大至覆盖75.7%画面。守卫通过对每个基元参数进行训练坐标箱体裁剪（每帧76微秒），将最坏情况覆盖限制至11.68%，并在20000个同时翻转下将渲染质量从10.6dB提升至21.8dB。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3DGS作为实时场景表示被部署在易发生单粒子翻转（SEU）的硬件（如太空处理器、机器人边缘设备）上，但缺乏对这类瞬态故障影响的研究与防御机制。

Method: 1）构建GPU并行故障注入引擎，对fp32/fp16/bf16三种格式的6个参数字段、所有比特位进行超380万次单比特翻转实验；2）推导基于IEEE-754布局和pipeline激活函数的闭式扰动界，预测每个比特位的影响排序；3）设计支持守卫（support guard）：对每个基元参数施加训练坐标箱体裁剪。

Result: 大部分翻转影响微小（高冗余），但少量高阶位（尤其符号位）可使单个基元覆盖75.7%画面。守卫将最坏覆盖限制至11.68%，在20000个同时翻转下将PSNR从10.6dB提升至21.8dB，且对干净模型无影响。

Conclusion: 提出的支持守卫是一种零开销（对干净模型）、高性价比的防御方案，能有效限制单比特翻转导致的灾难性画面污染，并适用于分布式渲染场景的节点级防护。

Abstract: Three-dimensional Gaussian splatting is a standard real-time scene representation increasingly deployed on hardware exposed to transient faults, such as spaceborne processors and robotic edge devices where silent data corruption occurs. A trained model is a large array of floating-point parameters in GPU memory, where a single-event upset corresponds to a single flipped bit. This paper measures these effects and constructs a defense. A GPU-resident parallel fault-injection engine applies over 3.8 million controlled single-bit upsets across four scenes, six fields, all bit positions, and three numeric formats (fp32, fp16, bf16), using 5.3 GPU-hours. The effect is highly concentrated: most upsets leave the image perceptually unchanged due to high redundancy, but a small set of high-order bits principally the logarithmic scale's sign bit enlarge a single primitive to cover up to 75.7% of the frame. A closed-form perturbation bound derived from the IEEE-754 layout and pipeline activations predicts this per-bit ordering. This concentration motivates a support guard: a per-primitive clamp of each parameter to the coordinate box observed during training, costing 76 us per frame. Over 768,000 guarded upsets, the worst corruption footprint is restricted to 11.68% of the frame. We prove the guard leaves clean models unchanged and prevents frame-covering corruption. Under an accumulated dose of 20,000 simultaneous upsets, the unguarded renderer degrades to 10.6 dB, whereas the guarded renderer remains at 21.8 dB. The corruption footprint also dictates the number of tile/compositing nodes contaminated in distributed renderers, where the per-node guard contains it.

</details>


### [434] [Mesh2GS: White-Box 3DGS Construction via Plenoptic Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21898)
*Haoran Zhu,Youcheng Cai,Huangsheng Du,Jingyang Meng,Ligang Liu*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出Mesh2GS框架，基于plenoptic采样理论将网格直接转换为3D高斯表示，实现奈奎斯特级别的全局光照渲染质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DGS与网格表示的关联主要集中在多视图图像到网格的逆向重建，而将网格转换为3DGS的问题关注较少，缺乏基于理论指导的转换方法。

Method: 1) 基于plenoptic采样理论的3DGS构建策略，理论推导最小采样率和高斯分布；2) 含反照率-着色分解的3DGS更新流程用于全局光照捕获；3) 神经光照增强模块处理非朗伯效应。

Result: 在实时共享渲染和非朗伯效应（如高光）捕获方面超越现有基线方法。

Conclusion: Mesh2GS是一种白盒式的网格到3DGS转换框架，具有理论依据且在实际应用中效果显著。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a promising method for high-quality, real-time 3D reconstruction. To associate 3DGS with mesh representations, existing methods primarily focus on 3DGS-to-mesh reconstruction from multi-view images. In contrast, the problem of converting a mesh into 3DGS has received comparatively less attention. Instead of relying on heuristic strategies that bind 3D Gaussians to the mesh, we propose a novel white-box 3DGS construction framework, termed Mesh2GS, which generates 3DGS directly from mesh geometry based on plenoptic sampling theory, achieving Nyquist-level performance for high-quality global illumination rendering. Firstly, we propose a plenoptic sampling guided 3DGS construction strategy that theoretically derives the minimum sampling rate of the sampled views and the distribution of 3D Gaussians. Second, we propose a novel 3DGS update procedure with albedo--shading decomposition for efficient global-illumination capture. Finally, we introduce a neural illumination enhancement module to handle non-Lambertian effects. Experimental results demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art baselines and is practically effective for both real-time shared rendering and non-Lambertian effects capturing specular highlights. The project code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [435] [Lighting-Consistent Object Transfer Across Radiance Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22481)
*Nicolás Violante,George Kopanas,Linus Franke,Julien Philip,George Drettakis*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于扩散模型的3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）对象合成光照协调方法，通过后优化步骤将不一致的合成视图协调为一致结果，实现跨场景对象转移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3DGS场景中提取的对象直接粘贴到目标场景时，由于光照条件不同会产生不真实的合成效果，需要光照协调方法来解决。

Method: 1) 从源场景提取对象并合成到目标场景，渲染出光照不一致的多视角图像；2) 训练扩散模型对每一视角图像进行光照协调（使用合成、生成和真实数据的异构数据集）；3) 通过后优化步骤将协调后的多视角图像整合为最终的3DGS表示。

Result: 相比之前的方法，该方法显著提升了3DGS对象转移的视觉质量，提供了令人信服的结果。

Conclusion: 该方法使3DGS之间的对象转移变得简单易用，且质量优于现有方法。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is widely used to capture and render real scenes. Compositing objects from one capture into another has applications in many domains, such as VFX, architecture and interior design, or marketing. However, extracting an object from a source scene and naively pasting it into a target scene will fail to produce realistic results due to the different lighting conditions between the two scenes. To address this problem, we introduce a diffusion model that harmonizes naively composited images with inconsistent lighting. The model is trained with a heterogeneous dataset of image pairs (inconsistent composite input, consistent output), combining synthetic, generated, and real data. Our complete 3D solution allows a user to extract an object from the source scene and composite it into the target scene. From this, the (inconsistent) views of the target scene with the composite object are rendered. Our diffusion model harmonizes each one of these views, which are finally consolidated in a 3DGS representation with a post-optimization step. Our method provides visually compelling results, making object transfer between 3DGS easy to use and significantly improving quality compared to previous methods.

</details>


### [436] [Line Drawings using LightBenders: Authoring and Illuminating](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22499)
*Hamed Alimohammadzadeh,Shahram Ghandeharizadeh*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套由无人机（LightBender）构成的空中照明系统，用于在空中呈现线稿和文字。硬件上采用伺服驱动关节和可寻址LED灯带，软件上包含编队估算、流场避让、飞行灯光文件生成、Blender插件及SVG导入工具。人类受试者实验（n=21）表明，10.1mm的最大对齐误差在感知上可接受，中位质量评分为8/10。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有照明系统缺乏在空中灵活呈现动态线稿和文字的能力，传统灯光阵列或投影方式无法实现自由三维空间中的可动画照明。

Method: 硬件：无人机搭载伺服驱动关节与高密度可寻址LED灯带（LightBender）；软件：①编队数量估计算法、下洗流规避算法、Swarm Flight and Lighting (SFL)文件生成与执行；②Blender插件实现一键注册、创作与部署；③SVG导入工具（Blender插件或独立LB-Author工具）。人类受试者实验评估对齐误差的感知影响。

Result: 系统最大对齐误差为10.1 mm；人类受试者实验（n=21）表明该误差在感知上可接受，中位质量评分为8/10。

Conclusion: 所提出的无人机编队照明系统能够有效在空中呈现线稿与文字，且对齐误差在人类感知可接受范围内，具备实际应用价值。

Abstract: This study presents the hardware and software architecture of a transformative system for illuminating line drawings and letterforms. These mid-air illuminations are indoors and might be animated. The hardware contribution is a drone equipped with servo-actuated rod joints and a dense, addressable LED strip that enables arbitrary orientation, a LightBender. The software contributions are threefold. First, the system implements algorithms and heuristics to estimate the minimum number of LightBenders required to render a line drawing or letterform, stagger swarm formations to mitigate LightBender downwash, generate Swarm Flight and Lighting (SFL) files, and execute these files using a swarm of LightBenders to illuminate line drawings and letterforms. Second, a Blender add-on enables users to register LightBenders, author graphics and animations represented by swarms of LightBenders, and deploy the swarm for illumination through one-click functions. Third, users may import SVG files into either the Blender add-on or a standalone LB-Author tool to illuminate line drawings directly from vector graphics.
  We present results from an IRB-approved human subject study (n=21) to evaluate the impact of LightBender misalignment on the perceived illuminations. Obtained results demonstrate that the system's 10.1 mm maximum misalignment is perceptually acceptable across tested illuminations, with a median quality rating of 8 on a 0-10 scale.

</details>


### [437] [Illuminating English Letters Using a Flying Light Speck](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22592)
*Hamed Alimohammadzadeh,Shahram Ghandeharizadeh*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文设计并实现了一种飞行光斑（FLS）系统，利用机载摄像头和计算能力对英文字母进行照明和轨迹跟踪。定量和定性评估（20人IRB批准的人体研究）显示42-56毫米的误差影响字母检测，且字母照明呈现顺序显著影响检测时长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索利用飞行光斑（FLS）对英文字母进行照明的可行性，并评估其准确性和人类感知效果。

Method: 设计FLS系统，利用机载摄像头和计算实现定位与轨迹跟踪；通过定量测量（误差分析）和定性评估（20人IRB批准的受试者研究）进行验证。

Result: FLS照明存在42至56毫米的误差，该误差影响字母的检测；字母照明的呈现顺序对检测时长有显著影响。

Conclusion: FLS可用于字母照明但精度有限（42-56mm误差），照明顺序是影响人类检测效率的关键因素。

Abstract: This paper presents the design and implementation of a Flying Light Speck (FLS) to illuminate English letters. The FLS uses its onboard camera and computing to localize and follow a trajectory to illuminate a letter. We evaluate the illuminations quantitatively and qualitatively. The latter is based on an IRB approved human subject study with 20 participants. The obtained results show a 42 to 56 millimeter error that impacts the detection of letters. A key finding is that the order in which the illumination of letters is presented to subjects has a significant effect on detection duration.

</details>


### [438] [DJM: Compact Base Meshes for Displacement Mapping using Triangle Jacobians](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22880)
*Congyi Zhang,Nicholas Vining,Yanhong Lin,Alireza Khatami,Ziyu Sun,Xiaohu Guo,Wenping Wang,Alla Sheffer*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于位移雅可比度量（DJM）的基网格构造方法，通过在简化过程中约束位移映射的双射性和低扭曲性（以雅可比下界衡量），实现了在更少三角形数量的基网格上更精确地逼近输入网格，并优于现有方法在精度与规模之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将复杂几何表示为定义在粗基网格上的位移函数，可以实现紧凑存储和加速渲染。核心挑战在于如何构造三角形数量尽可能少的基网格，同时使位移函数能准确逼近输入网格。现有方法在基网格构造中未充分考虑位移函数的畸变，导致精度与规模权衡不佳。

Method: 提出DJM（位移雅可比度量）方法，通过评估位移函数的逐点雅可比来度量畸变，并基于此指导基网格构造。具体而言，提出一种基于QEM简化方案的变体，在简化过程中约束输入网格与基网格之间的位移映射保持双射且低扭曲（即满足映射雅可比的下界）。同时，通过显式存储输入网格到基网格的映射，并使用鲁棒的逆重心位移求解器获得密集的基到网格对应关系，避免了不可靠的射线-网格求交。

Result: DJM方法在重建精度与网格规模之间的权衡上优于现有方案，并在微网格渲染和神经编码中展示了其鲁棒性和可用性。

Conclusion: 基于位移雅可比度量指导基网格构造能有效提升复杂几何表示的精度-规模权衡，该方法的鲁棒性使其适用于微网格渲染和神经编码等实际应用。

Abstract: Representing complex geometry as a displacement function defined over a coarse base mesh enables compact storage and accelerated rendering. The core challenge in converting detailed triangle meshes into this representation is computing base meshes that have as few triangles as possible, while also supporting displacement functions that accurately approximate the input. Accurate approximation requires the supported displacement functions to bijectively map the input surface onto the base with low parametric distortion. We observe that this distortion can be measured by evaluating the pointwise Jacobian of the displacement functions. Our new DJM (Displacement Jacobian Metric)-based base-mesh construction method uses the Jacobian of the displacement functions to guide base mesh computation, enabling us to outperform prior approaches in terms of accuracy to size trade-off. We achieve this goal by proposing a variant of the QEM-based simplification scheme that constrains the displacement mapping between the input and the base to be bijective and low distortion (defined as satisfying a lower bound on the mapping Jacobian). When evaluating and encoding the displacement maps, we avoid unreliable ray-mesh intersections by explicitly storing the mapping between the input mesh and the base throughout the construction process, and use this mapping within a robust inverse barycentric displacement solver to obtain dense base-to-mesh correspondences to assist all computations. We demonstrate DJM to outperform alternative schemes in terms of reconstruction accuracy to size trade-off, and demonstrate its robustness and usability for micromesh-based rendering and neural encoding.

</details>


### [439] [Controllable Texture Tiling with Transformed RoPE-Enhanced Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22945)
*Junrong Huang,Zhiyuan Zhang,Rui Tang,Hongbo Fu,Jnig Liao*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于扩散Transformer的可控高保真纹理平铺框架，通过坐标变换旋转位置嵌入（实现无需像素扭曲的精确空间控制）和分离注意力掩码（防止语义泄露，保持结构完整性）两项技术创新，在控制精度和纹理保真度上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有材质迁移和参考引导修复方法无法满足纹理平铺任务中对参考图案按用户定义参数（频率、方向、尺度）精确重复的需求，且生成方法受限于破坏性像素级重采样或缺乏细粒度空间信息，难以保持参考纹理的结构保真度和原始场景的光照几何一致性。

Method: 提出基于扩散Transformer的框架，包含两项创新：1) 坐标变换旋转位置嵌入（CT-RoPE），通过对目标潜变量与图像条件之间的相对位置嵌入施加2D仿射变换，实现无需显式像素扭曲的精确平铺控制；2) 分离注意力掩码，屏蔽参考特征的语义泄露，在保持结构完整性的同时将合成纹理与场景光照几何无缝融合。

Result: 大量实验表明，该方法在控制精度和纹理保真度上均优于当前最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: 所提框架通过解耦空间操作与内容生成，有效解决了纹理平铺任务中的精确控制和保真度难题。

Abstract: Realistic integration of user-specified textures into scene images is a fundamental task in computer graphics and image editing. While existing material transfer and reference-guided inpainting methods can edit surface appearances, they often fail to address the specific requirements of texture tiling. This task necessitates precisely repeating a reference pattern according to user-defined parameters such as frequency, orientation, and scale. Furthermore, current generative approaches often struggle to maintain the structural fidelity of the reference texture, limited by either destructive pixel-level resampling or the lack of fine-grained spatial information in semantic image encoders, and they frequently fail to preserve the coherent lighting and geometry of the original scene. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for controllable and high-fidelity texture tiling based on Diffusion Transformers. Our approach introduces two key technical innovations to decouple spatial manipulation from content generation. First, we propose a Coordinate-Transformed Rotary Embedding mechanism. By applying 2D affine transformations directly to the relative positional embeddings between the target latent and the image condition, we achieve precise control over tiling patterns without explicit pixel warping, thereby utilizing the full information of the reference condition without degradation. Second, a Disjoint Attention Mask is employed to shield reference features from semantic leakage. This preserves structural integrity while seamlessly blending the synthesized texture with the scene's original lighting and geometry. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both control accuracy and texture fidelity.

</details>


### [440] [VolHuMe: a High-Resolution Large Scale Dataset of Volumetric Human Meshes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23062)
*Giulia Martinelli,Niccolò Bisagno,Nicola Garau,Esa Rahtu,Nicola Conci*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: VolHuMe是一个高质量4D人体扫描数据集，包含104名受试者，使用64个RGB和32个深度相机捕捉，提供丰富的真实标注（SMPL-X、高分辨率网格、多视图RGB/深度图像、服装分割等），采用近距高分辨率采集以保留精细身体部位细节，并在3D/4D人体重建任务上对现有方法进行基准测试，揭示了当前评估体系的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据集主要依赖全身图像，缺乏能够保留精细身体部位细节（如手部和面部几何）的高分辨率4D人体数据，限制了人体重建方法在几何保真度和纹理分辨率上的评估与发展。

Method: 使用64个RGB和32个深度相机构建体积捕捉工作室，对104名受试者进行近距高分辨率4D扫描，并提供SMPL-X参数化模型、高分辨率网格、多视图RGB/深度图像、绑定网格、点云、服装分割以及精细手部和面部几何等丰富标注。

Result: 在3D和4D人体重建任务上对现有最先进方法进行基准测试，展示了数据集的高质量，同时暴露了当前评估测试平台的局限性。

Conclusion: VolHuMe为4D人体重建领域提供了一个高质量、多模态的基准数据集，能够推动该领域方法的发展并改进评估标准。

Abstract: We introduce VolHuMe, a dataset of high-quality 4D human scans captured with a state-of-the-art volumetric studio using 64 RGB and 32 depth cameras. VolHuMe contains individual captures of 104 subjects and provides extensive ground truth, including SMPL-X, high-resolution meshes, multi-view RGB/depth images, rigged meshes, point clouds, garment segmentation, and detailed hand and facial geometry. Unlike prior datasets that primarily rely on full-body imagery, VolHuMe uses a close-range, high-resolution capture setup that preserves fine-grained body-part details, improving geometric fidelity and texture resolution. We benchmark VolHuMe on state-of-the-art methods across 3D and 4D human reconstruction tasks, showcasing the dataset's quality and exposing the limitations of current evaluation testbeds.

</details>


### [441] [MeshFlow: Mesh Generation with Equivariant Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23489)
*Qi Sun,Kiyohiro Nakayama,Jing Nathan Yan,Qixing Huang,Alexander Rush,Leonidas Guibas,Gordon Wetzstein,Jing Liao,Guandao Yang*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: MeshFlow提出了一种直接生成三角形网格的流匹配方法，通过等变最优传输流匹配模型保持三角形网格的置换不变性，在保证生成质量的同时实现约18倍推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网格是常见的3D场景表示，但直接生成网格具有挑战性，因为表示中包含重要的对称性（面与顶点的置换不变性）。现有方法需要将网格序列化为长自回归序列，效率低下。

Method: 采用等变最优传输流匹配模型来尊重三角形网格的关键对称性；对Diffusion Transformer架构进行简单有效的修改以保持所需等变性；引入基于最优传输的训练目标，消除违反对称性的监督信号。

Result: 生成质量与最先进的自回归网格生成器相当，推理速度提升约18倍。

Conclusion: MeshFlow通过保持对称性的流匹配模型，实现了高效且高质量的网格直接生成。

Abstract: Meshes are among the most common 3D scene representations, but directly generating meshes is challenging because the representation contains important symmetries, including permutation invariance of faces and vertices. MeshFlow learns to generate triangle meshes directly as triangle soups, avoiding the need to serialize meshes into long autoregressive sequences. We adopt equivariant optimal-transport flow matching models that respect the key symmetries of triangle soups: arbitrary permutations of faces and permutations of the vertices within each face.
  Toward this goal, we propose a simple yet effective modification to the Diffusion Transformer architecture, resulting in a scalable network capable of modeling a velocity field while maintaining the desired equivariance. We further introduce an optimal-transport-based training objective that improves convergence by eliminating supervision signals that violate these symmetries. MeshFlow achieves mesh quality comparable to state-of-the-art autoregressive mesh generators while providing about an 18$\times$ speedup during inference. Project page is at https://qiisun.github.io/MeshFlow/.

</details>


<div id='cs.IT'></div>

# cs.IT [[Back]](#toc)

### [442] [Stable Image Reconstruction via Two-Parameter Power-Scale Variation Minimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23083)
*Ziwei Li,Wengu Chen,Huanmin Ge,Limei Huo,Dachun Yang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种具有两个可调参数（稀疏诱导指数 p 和缩放因子 a）的功率尺度变分（PSV_{a,p}）模型，通过最小化该模型在 RIP 框架下建立了梯度域和图像域的稳定重建，并设计了 IRLSPSV 算法。实验表明其优越性能和广泛适用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像重建方法在灵活性和适用性方面存在局限，需要一种具有更多可调参数以适应不同场景的变分模型。

Method: 提出 PSV_{a,p} 变分模型（含两个可调参数 a 和 p）；在 RIP 框架下建立稳定重建理论；设计 IRLSPSV 迭代重加权最小二乘算法求解无约束 PSV_{a,p} 最小化问题。

Result: PSV_{a,p} 最小化因双可调参数具有高度灵活性和广泛适用性；当 a→∞ 时退化为 TV_p 最小化，此时 RIP 条件是全新的；推导的 RIP 上界在梯度恢复中对 a 是渐近最优的；敏感性分析确认了 a 和 p 的不同作用。

Conclusion: PSV_{a,p} 模型通过两个可调参数实现了更好的灵活性和重建性能，IRLSPSV 算法有效求解该模型，理论结果（RIP 条件及其最优性）为模型提供了坚实保证。

Abstract: In this article, we introduce a power-scale variation (PSV$_{a,p}$) with two tunable parameters: the sparsity-inducing exponent $p\in(0,1]$ and the scaling factor $a\in(0,\infty)$. By minimizing the PSV$_{a,p}$, we establish stable reconstructions in both the gradient and the image domains under the restricted isometry property (RIP) framework. Furthermore, we design an iteratively re-weighted least squares algorithm IRLSPSV to solve the unconstrained PSV$_{a,p}$ minimization. Numerical experiments demonstrate its superior performance and broad applicability. The main novelties are: (i) the PSV$_{a,p}$ minimization enjoys great flexibility and wide applicability due to its two tunable parameters $a$ and $p$, (ii) as $a\to\infty$, the PSV$_{a,p}$ minimization reduces to the $p$-th power total variation (TV$_p$) minimization and, even in this limiting case, the established RIP condition for image reconstruction is also new, (iii) the derived RIP upper bound $\overlineδ$ is proved to be asymptotically optimal in $a$ for gradient recovery, (iv) sensitivity analysis confirms the distinct roles of $a$ and $p$, thereby motivating a practical parameter tuning scheme for the proposed model.

</details>


### [443] [Holographic Beamforming for Semantic Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20887)
*Shuhao Zeng,Haobo Zhang,Su Wang,Boya Di,Hongliang Zhang,Zhu Han,H. Vincent Poor,Lingyang Song*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于超材料天线的语义感知全息波束赋形方案，通过数据拟合建立语义重要性-接收SNR-通信性能的映射关系，并设计相应算法优先保障高重要性语义信息的可靠传输，仿真验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全息波束赋形方案主要面向传统比特通信系统，将所有比特视为同等重要，忽略了语义通信中不同语义信息对任务完成贡献不等的特点，直接应用会导致语义重要性与接收SNR不匹配，降低性能。

Method: 1) 通过数据拟合刻画语义通信性能对语义重要性和接收SNR的依赖关系；2) 设计语义感知的全息波束赋形算法，利用超材料天线可调辐射幅度结构，优先保障高重要性语义信息的可靠传输。

Result: 仿真结果验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 语义重要性感知的全息波束赋形能够有效支持语义通信，通过匹配语义重要性与传输质量提升系统性能。

Abstract: Holographic beamforming enabled by metamaterial antennas has been proposed to facilitate spatial multiplexing at low hardware cost and low power consumption. However, existing holographic beamforming schemes are mainly developed for conventional bit-communication systems, which have not considered semantic-level importance and thus cannot be directly applied to support semantic communication. Specifically, in conventional bit communication, all bits are treated as equally important. In contrast, in semantic communication, different semantic information contribute unequally to task completion and therefore has different degrees of importance, with more important information requiring higher transmission quality. Ignoring semantic importance in holographic beamforming causes mismatches between importance of semantic information and its received SNR, thus degrading performances. In this paper, we propose a semantic-importance-aware holographic beamforming scheme enabled by metamaterial antennas with tunable radiated amplitudes to support semantic communication. It is challenging to design semantic-aware holographic beamforming schemes due to non-trivial modeling of the impact of semantic importance and unique amplitude-controlled structures of holographic beamforming. To address this, we characterize the dependence of semantic communication performance on semantic importance and received SNR via data fitting, and design a semantic-aware holographic beamforming algorithm to ensure reliable delivery of highly important semantic information. Simulation results validate effectiveness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [444] [Learning-Based List Sequential Belief Propagation Decoding of Quantum LDPC Codes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20926)
*Mohsen Moradi,Taejoon Kim,Remi A. Chou*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的列表顺序BP译码器（RL-LS BP），通过将强化学习驱动的顺序变量节点调度与列表搜索相结合，在保留主轨迹的同时探索次优符号分支，利用累积路径度量对候选轨迹进行排序剪枝，从而提升QLDPC码的译码性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: QLDPC码是容错量子计算的有力候选，但标准BP译码器因短环、退化性和收敛性差而面临高效译码的重大挑战。

Method: 在强化学习顺序调度（RL-S）框架基础上引入列表搜索：学习策略每步选择下一个变量节点更新，保留原RL-S轨迹的同时，通过将后更新LLR对软偏向次优Pauli符号、重新计算局部BP消息并设置该节点为次优符号来探索竞争分支，使用累积路径度量对候选轨迹排序剪枝。

Result: 在去极化信道下的代表性QLDPC基准码上，所提方法提升了基础译码器的译码性能，并与现有BP类译码方法相比具有竞争力。

Conclusion: RL-LS BP译码器通过结合学习顺序调度的改进收敛性与列表探索，有效提升了QLDPC码的译码效果。

Abstract: Quantum low-density parity-check (QLDPC) codes are strong candidates for fault-tolerant quantum computation, but efficient decoding remains a major challenge due to short cycles, degeneracy, and the poor convergence of standard belief-propagation (BP) decoders. We propose a reinforcement learning-based list sequential (RL-LS) BP decoder for QLDPC codes by extending the reinforcement-learning-based sequential variable-node scheduling (RL-S) framework with list-based search. At each step, the learned policy selects the next variable node to update; the decoder then retains the ordinary RL-S trajectory while also exploring a competing branch obtained by softly biasing the post-update LLR pair toward the second-most likely Pauli symbol, recomputing the incident local BP messages, and setting the visited variable node to that second-best symbol. Candidate trajectories are ranked and pruned using our proposed cumulative path metric. The resulting decoder extends the learned decoder by combining the improved convergence of learned sequential scheduling with list exploration. Numerical results on representative QLDPC benchmark codes over the depolarizing channel show that our proposed method improves the decoding performance of the underlying decoder and compares favorably with existing BP-based decoding methods.

</details>


### [445] [Reinforcement Learning-Based Secure Beamforming Against Satellite Eavesdroppers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21025)
*Juhwan Seo,Hyesang Cho,Dong-Hyun Jung*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文针对多非合谋卫星窃听者存在下的上行低轨卫星通信物理层安全问题，提出了一种基于约束马尔可夫决策过程和原始-对偶柔性演员-评论家算法的安全波束成形方法，在Nakagami-m衰落信道下实现了低复杂度的实时安全传输。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低轨卫星通信中，由于轨道几何时变特性和概率性衰落引起的中断约束，安全波束成形设计面临挑战，现有方法难以在动态环境下兼顾性能与实时性。

Method: 推导了Nakagami-m衰落下连接中断和保密中断概率的闭式表达式及可微上界代价函数；将非凸保密速率最大化问题重构为约束马尔可夫决策过程；提出多头代价批评家的原始-对偶软演员-评论家算法，通过拉格朗日松弛联合优化波束成形并强制平均中断约束。

Result: 所提框架在所有窃听者配置下均优于最大比传输，在密集窃听场景下优于迫零；相比离线逐次凸逼近基准仅差7%以内，且仅需单次前向传播，支持低复杂度实时操作。

Conclusion: 该方法适用于动态低轨卫星环境下的安全波束成形，实现了实时性与性能的良好权衡。

Abstract: This paper investigates physical-layer security for uplink low Earth orbit (LEO) satellite communications in the presence of multiple non-colluding satellite eavesdroppers. Secure beamforming design in such systems is challenging due to time-varying orbital geometry and probabilistic fading-induced outage constraints. To address this, we first derive tractable closed-form expressions for both connection and secrecy outage probabilities under Nakagami-m fading, and develop differentiable upper-bound cost functions that are amenable to optimization. Next, to exploit the predictable orbital dynamics and temporal correlation of satellite mobility, we reformulate the non-convex secrecy rate maximization problem as a constrained Markov decision process. We then develop a primal-dual soft actor-critic algorithm with a multi-head cost critic that jointly optimizes beamforming while enforcing average outage constraints via Lagrangian relaxation. Numerical results show that the proposed framework improves the ergodic secrecy rate over maximum ratio transmission across all eavesdropper configurations, and outperforms zero-forcing in dense eavesdropping regimes. It achieves within 7 percent of an offline successive convex approximation benchmark while requiring only a single forward pass, enabling low-complexity real-time operation. These results indicate that the proposed approach is applicable to secure beamforming in dynamic LEO satellite environments.

</details>


### [446] [Error Exponent Bounds for Optimal Short-Read Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21218)
*Yoav Chachamovitz,Nir Weinberger*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了DNA存储解码中的无监督聚类问题，针对经过无记忆信道产生的噪声短序列，推导了最优聚类规则下错误概率的上界和下界，分析了序列长度、读取次数和信道统计的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受DNA存储解码器操作的启发，研究如何从多个未知源序列经过无记忆信道后产生的噪声短序列中进行无监督聚类，以确定各序列的来源。

Method: 聚焦于统计最优的聚类规则，推导了错误聚类概率的上界和下界，考虑了序列长度、读取次数和信道统计参数的影响。

Result: 给出了最优聚类规则下错误概率的理论界限，明确了序列长度、读取次数和信道统计对聚类性能的影响关系。

Conclusion: 为DNA存储解码中的无监督聚类问题提供了理论分析框架，有助于理解该场景下聚类性能的极限。

Abstract: Motivated by the operation of decoders for DNA storage, we consider the problem of unsupervised clustering of noisy short sequences, each generated from one of multiple possible unknown source sequences after passing through a memoryless channel. Focusing on the statistically optimal clustering rule, we derive upper and lower bounds on the probability of incorrect clustering as a function of the sequence length, the number of reads, and the channel statistics.

</details>


### [447] [On the Weight Spectrum of the Reed-Muller Codes $RM(7,14)$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21425)
*Milo Leuenberger,Manuel Albrizzio*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了 Reed-Muller 码 $RM(m-7,m)$ 的重量谱，特别是试图完全确定 $RM(7,14)$ 的重量谱。尽管找到了几乎所有重量，仍有八个缺失的重量未能确定，这对于回答 $c=7$ 时 $RM(m-c,m)$ 重量谱的一个开放问题是必要的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Reed-Muller 码的重量谱是编码理论中的一个重要未解决问题。作者试图确定 $RM(m-7,m)$ 的重量谱，以回答关于 $c=7$ 时 $RM(m-c,m)$ 重量谱的开放问题。

Method: 通过分析和计算 $RM(7,14)$ 的重量分布，尝试完全确定其重量谱。作者找到了除八个缺失重量外的所有重量值。

Result: 几乎完全确定了 $RM(7,14)$ 的重量谱，但仍有八个缺失的重量未能找到。

Conclusion: 要给出 $c=7$ 时 $RM(m-c,m)$ 重量谱开放问题的肯定答案，需要找到这八个缺失的重量。

Abstract: In this paper, we attempt to find the weight spectrum of the Reed-Muller codes $RM(m-7,m)$. In the process, we tried to fully determine the weight spectrum of $RM(7,14)$. We found almost all of the weights, except for a select number of them. The remaining eight missing weights are necessary to give a positive answer to an open question on the weight spectrum of $RM(m-c,m)$ for $c=7$.

</details>


### [448] [Embedded Polygon Symbolic Transfer Entropy (EPSTE): A Geometric Token and Deep Learning Approach to Estimating Transfer Entropy in Neuroimaging Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21754)
*David Alexander Finnigan*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出嵌入式多边形符号传递熵（EPSTE）框架，通过将神经时间序列分解为几何基元的符号化表示，结合循环神经网络与注意力多实例学习，从MEG数据中稳定推断有向连接，在配对级别实现了近乎完美的有向结构恢复，显著优于传统符号基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EEG/MEG中基于信息论的定向交互推断存在噪声、非平稳性以及高样本复杂度等挑战；传统的传递熵（TE）估计在有限数据条件下（尤其随嵌入维数增加）不稳定，亟需更具鲁棒性和可学习性的估计方法。

Method: 将神经时间序列分解为局部三点几何基元（幅值、曲率、方向变化），离散化为符号令牌构建紧凑状态空间，在其上估计符号传递熵；使用循环神经网络结合注意力多实例学习框架，从符号化时间窗口袋中预测经过替代检验验证的TE值。

Result: 局部窗口级预测存在噪声，但跨试次和通道对聚合后得到稳定的有向依赖；在配对级别，EPSTE实现了近乎完美的有向连接结构恢复，绝对误差显著低于标准符号基线方法。

Conclusion: 表示的几何结构（而非原始幅度或简单符号化）对于实现信息论依赖关系的实际可学习性至关重要。

Abstract: Inferring directed interactions between neural systems from EEG and MEG remains challenging due to noise, nonstationarity, and the high sample complexity of information-theoretic estimators. Transfer Entropy (TE) provides a principled and model-free measure of directed information flow; however, its practical estimation is not stable in finite data regimes (particularly as embedding dimension increases). This work introduces Embedded Polygon Symbolic Transfer Entropy (EPSTE), a framework that reframes TE estimation as a learnable problem operating on structured symbolic representations of local temporal morphology rather than raw signal amplitudes. Neural time series are decomposed into sequences of geometric primitives derived from local triplets of samples encoding complementary aspects of waveform structure such as magnitude, curvature and directional change. These primitives are discretised into symbolic tokens, yielding a compact but expressive state space over which symbolic TE is estimated. A recurrent neural network with attention-based multiple-instance learning is trained to predict surrogate-validated TE values from bags of symbolic temporal windows. The method is evaluated on source-reconstructed MEG data parcellated using the AAL90 atlas and compared against a standard symbolic baseline using identical architectures and supervision. The results demonstrate that while local window-level predictions are noisy, aggregation across trials and channel pairs yields stable directed dependencies. At the pair level, EPSTE achieves near-perfect recovery of ground-truth directed structure and significantly lower absolute error than the baseline, indicating that representational geometry plays a critical role in enabling practical learnability of information-theoretic dependencies.

</details>


### [449] [One-Bit Clustering for Two Component Sub-Gaussian Mixture Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21873)
*Junren Chen,Yun Yang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出首个用于双分量次高斯混合模型的一位聚类方法，仅使用每个样本经抖动量化后的一位信息。研究表明，在温和的非尖峰条件下，Lloyd算法变体可实现与未量化设置相当的信噪比下的指数级衰减误分类率，且精确恢复的分离条件仅比最优阈值多一个对数因子。当维度足够大时，通过Haar随机旋转可满足非尖峰条件。同时建立了极小极大下界，展示了锐利常数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 聚类是统计和机器学习中的基本问题，现有方法通常需要高精度数据。本文旨在探索是否可以通过仅利用每样本一位（即二值化）信息实现高效聚类，从而在极低通信或存储开销下保持理论性能保证。

Method: 提出一种基于抖动量化（dithered quantizer）的一位聚类方法，每个样本仅保留一位信息；采用Lloyd算法的变体进行聚类；通过随机旋转（Haar分布矩阵）预处理确保非尖峰条件在高维下成立；理论分析包括指数级衰减的误分类率界、精确恢复的分离条件以及极小极大下界。

Result: 理论证明该方法误分类率以指数速率衰减，信号-噪声比与未量化设置相当；精确恢复所需分离条件仅比最优阈值多对数因子；高维下随机旋转可保证非尖峰条件成立（部分恢复需p≳1，精确恢复需p≳log n log log n）；极小极大下界显示常数的锐利性；数值实验验证了理论有效性。

Conclusion: 该研究表明，在适当条件下，仅利用一位信息即可实现与全精度数据可比拟的聚类性能，为极低比特通信或存储场景下的聚类分析提供了理论基础和可行方案。

Abstract: Clustering is a fundamental problem in statistics and machine learning. We propose the first one-bit clustering method for two-component sub-Gaussian mixture models. The method uses only one bit per entry of each sample obtained via a dithered quantizer. Under a mild non-spikiness condition on the cluster centers, we show that a variant of Lloyd's algorithm achieves a misclassification rate that decays exponentially with a signal-to-noise ratio comparable to that in the unquantized setting. This result further implies exact recovery under an explicit separation condition, which exceeds the optimal threshold for unquantized data by only a logarithmic factor. When the dimension $p$ is sufficiently large, the non-spikiness condition can be enforced by applying a random rotation using a Haar distributed matrix prior to quantization. In particular, it holds with high probability when $p \gtrsim 1$ for partial recovery and $p \gtrsim \log n \log\log n$ for exact recovery, where $n$ is the sample size. We also establish a minimax lower bound, showing that the misclassification rate and separation condition exhibit sharp constants in general. Numerical results are provided to corroborate the theory and demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method.

</details>


### [450] [Auditing Combinatorial Randomness from Finite Transcripts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22034)
*Faruk Alpay,Levent Sarioglu*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究在有限公开转录本下，对 $m$ 个标签中 $k$ 子集均匀无放回抽样的黑盒审计问题。理论证明了无限制均匀性检验的样本复杂度下界为 $\Theta(\sqrt{\binom{m}{k}}/\varepsilon^2)$，并针对结构化偏差构造了多种在超单纯形上的生成器无关审计方法。通过GPU蒙特卡洛实验验证了联合几何结构能检测到一维检验难以发现的偏差，且多种统计量在错误发现率校正后均不显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 公开随机性的部署行为往往只能通过有限转录本观测，而现有方法未充分研究在有限样本下如何对结构化偏差进行有效审计。作者旨在填补这一理论空白，明确哪些结构化偏差能被有限公开转录本检测，以及所需样本量。

Method: 理论层面推导了无限制均匀性检验的样本复杂度下界；构造了基于边际卡方、成对最大值、序列重叠、锚点盒差异及低维零假设/最小生成树几何等统计量的生成器无关审计方法；证明了一种有限证人保证（样本复杂度与审计证人数量对数相关）。实验采用GPU蒙特卡洛模拟，每条件下达30万零假设和6万备择假设复制，在 $n=1{,}956$ 下评估不同结构化偏差（块聚类、带排斥）的检验功效。

Result: 所有统计量经错误发现率校正后均不显著（最小BH $q=0.279$）。块聚类备择（强度0.04）下，成对最大值的功效为0.638，而边际卡方仅0.051；带排斥备择（强度0.08）下，锚点盒的功效为0.741，而边际卡方仅0.051。表明联合几何特征（成对最大值、锚点盒）对结构化偏差的检测能力显著优于一维边际检验。

Conclusion: 有限公开转录本能够检测某些结构化偏差，但依赖于适当的联合几何统计量；一维边际检验对保持边际分布的结构化偏差几乎无效；有限证人保证框架可极大降低审计的样本复杂度。

Abstract: Public randomness is a security primitive whose deployed behavior is often observable only through a finite transcript. We study black-box auditing of $k$-subset draws from $m$ labels under the exact uniform-without-replacement null. The outcome space has size $\binom{m}{k}$, and unrestricted uniformity testing therefore requires $Θ(\sqrt{\binom{m}{k}}/\varepsilon^2)$ samples, establishing an information-theoretic limit on transcript-only certification. For structured faults, we construct generator-agnostic audits on the hypersimplex using marginal chi-square, pair maxima, serial overlap, anchored-box discrepancy, and low-dimensional $H_0$/MST geometry, all calibrated under the exact combinatorial null. We also prove a finite-witness guarantee whose sample complexity depends logarithmically on the number of audited witnesses rather than on the full support size. Across observed and reference-source audits, no statistic remains significant after false-discovery correction (minimum BH $q=0.279$). GPU Monte Carlo experiments, using up to 300,000 null and 60,000 alternative replications per condition, show that marginal-preserving deviations can evade one-dimensional tests while remaining detectable through joint geometry. At $n=1{,}956$, a block-cluster alternative of strength 0.04 yields power 0.638 for pair maxima versus 0.051 for marginal chi-square; a band-repulsion alternative of strength 0.08 yields power 0.741 for anchored boxes versus 0.051. These results characterize which structured deviations finite public transcripts can detect and the sample sizes required for doing so.

</details>


### [451] [Hulls and sums of separable constacyclic codes over $\mathbb{F}_q \times (\mathbb{F}_q+v\mathbb{F}_q)$ and new quantum codes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22069)
*Yu Qian,Yu Wang,Liqi Wang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了有限域上可分常循环码的欧几里得对偶和埃尔米特对偶的生成多项式，给出了其Gray像的生成多项式，并进一步推导了欧几里得核、埃尔米特核以及欧几里得和、埃尔米特和的生成多项式。最后提出了两种从这些核与和中构造量子纠错码的方法，得到了参数优于现有结果的新量子码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子纠错码的构造是量子计算与量子通信中的关键问题，而常循环码的核与和为构造QECC提供了重要途径。本文旨在系统地建立可分常循环码及其Gray像的对偶、核与和的代数结构，从而提出新的QECC构造方法。

Method: 基于环S = F_q × (F_q+vF_q)（v^2=v，q为奇素数幂）上可分常循环码的代数结构，推导其欧几里得对偶和埃尔米特对偶的生成多项式；通过Gray映射建立像空间的对应关系；进一步导出核与和的生成多项式；利用这些代数结构提出两种QECC构造方法。

Result: 给出了可分常循环码及其Gray像在欧几里得和埃尔米特度量下对偶、核与和的生成多项式显式表达式；提出了两种基于核与和的QECC构造方案；得到的新QECC在参数上优于已有量子码。

Conclusion: 本文完整刻画了环S上可分常循环码的对偶、核与和的代数结构，为利用这些结构构造性能更优的量子纠错码提供了系统性的理论框架和有效方法。

Abstract: We establish the generator polynomials of the Euclidean and Hermitian duals of separable constacyclic codes over $\mathcal{S} = \mathbb{F}_q \times (\mathbb{F}_q+v\mathbb{F}_q)$, with $q$ an odd prime power and $v^2=v$, and we derive the generator polynomials of their Gray images, respectively. The generator polynomials of the Euclidean hulls and Hermitian hulls of separable constacyclic codes over $\mathcal{S}$ and their Gray images are presented, respectively. Furthermore, we provide the generator polynomials of the Euclidean sums and Hermitian sums of separable constacyclic codes and their Gray images, respectively. Finally, we propose two methods to yield quantum error-correcting codes (QECCs) from the hulls and sums of separable constacyclic codes over $\mathcal{S}$, and generate new QECCs that outperform the existing ones in terms of parameters.

</details>


### [452] [Spatial Modulation for Tx-SIMO-FAS: Port Selection and Performance Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22280)
*Xusheng Zhu,Kai-Kit Won,Hanjiang Hong,Chenguang Rao,Kaitao Meng*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究发射端配备流体天线系统（FAS）的单输入多输出（SIMO）架构下的空间调制（SM）问题，提出三种考虑空间相关性的端口选择方案（SF-EDAS、SOPS、CC-COAS），通过信道分解分析可靠性，数值结果表明所提方案显著优于传统SM方法，其中CC-COAS在误码性能与计算复杂度之间取得最佳平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FAS在有限孔径内支持大量流体天线端口，但强空间相关性降低了端口索引的可区分性，导致索引检测可靠性下降。现有方法未充分考虑这一问题，因此需要设计相关性感知的端口选择方案以提升FAS-SM系统的性能。

Method: 提出了三种相关性感知的端口选择方案：SF-EDAS（增强接收星座分离）、SOPS（改善信道基条件数）、CC-COAS（联合优化信道增益与端口间去相关）。通过将信道分解为能量基自由度（DoF）和极值DoF进行可靠性分析，高SNR下推导有效分集阶数，并利用Digamma函数标量等效独立视近似刻画孔径受限阵列增益。

Result: 数值结果表明，所提方案显著优于传统SM和基于分组的方法；CC-COAS在误码性能与计算复杂度之间取得最佳折衷；有效分集阶数由所选端口数、接收天线数和能量基空间DoF共同决定。

Conclusion: FAS-SM结合相关性感知端口选择可有效克服空间相关性带来的性能损失，为未来高密度天线系统中的空间调制提供了新的设计思路与理论分析框架。

Abstract: This paper considers a single-input multiple-output (SIMO) setup with a fluid antenna system (FAS) at the transmitter side and multiple fixed antennas at the receiver, which is referred to as a Tx-SIMO-FAS. We investigate the use of spatial modulation (SM) utilizing the FAS on a single radio-frequency (RF) chain while the receiver side performs maximum-likelihood detection. Unlike conventional antenna arrays, however, the large number of fluid antenna ports accommodated within a limited aperture introduces strong spatial correlation, which reduces the distinguishability of port indices and degrades the reliability of index detection. To address this challenge, three correlation-aware port-selection schemes are proposed: successive fluid Euclidean-distance-optimized selection (SF-EDAS), successive orthogonal port selection (SOPS), and correlation-constrained orthogonal array selection (CC-COAS). These schemes focus on enhancing received-constellation separation, improving channel-basis conditioning, and jointly optimizing channel gain and inter-port decorrelation, respectively. To understand the performance limits of FAS-SM, a reliability analysis is developed by decomposing the channel into an energy-based degree of freedom (DoF), and an extreme-value DoF. High signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) analysis reveals an effective diversity order determined by the number of selected ports, the number of receive antennas, and the energy-based spatial DoF. Furthermore, the aperture-limited array gain is characterized through a scalar equivalent independent-look approximation involving the Digamma function. Numerical results demonstrate that the proposed schemes significantly outperform conventional SM and grouping-based benchmarks. Among them, CC-COAS achieves the most favorable tradeoff between error performance and computational complexity.

</details>


### [453] [Differentiable Conditional Mutual Information for Multi-Terminal Linear Gaussian Wireless Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22301)
*Tadashi Wadayama,Siqi Na*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于高斯有向无环图（Gaussian-DAG）的统一框架，通过自动微分技术实现对任意条件互信息及其梯度的闭式计算，从而将多终端高斯信道（多址、广播、干扰、中继）的速率区域优化转化为端到端可微问题，并通过三个实验验证了该方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多终端高斯信道的速率区域由输入输出节点间的条件互信息界定，但现有方法缺乏统一的计算图来高效评估这类条件互信息及其梯度，导致物理层可微设计困难。

Method: 将网络建模为线性高斯有向无环图（Gaussian-DAG），通过K-recursion前向传播得到节点对协方差，以两个子块Schur补的对数行列式差给出条件互信息$I(V_A;V_B|V_C)$的闭式解；整个构建基于自动微分（AD）原语，通过一次反向模式AD扫描即可获得对所有可设计参数的Wirtinger梯度。

Result: 在三个实验（两用户MIMO多址信道速率区域最大化、MIMO窃听信道安全预编码、多跳多址网络速率区域优化）中成功验证了框架的有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架使得任何由有限多个条件互信息构成的可微函数（包括加权和速率、保密率等线性目标，以及标准多终端速率区域函数等非线性复合目标）均可通过投影梯度迭代直接优化，无需针对具体问题推导梯度。

Abstract: The rate regions of multi-terminal Gaussian channels (multiple-access, broadcast, interference, relay) are delimited by conditional mutual informations $I(V_A;V_B\,|\,V_C)$ among groups of input and output nodes; bringing such channels under differentiable physical-layer design therefore hinges on evaluating any such conditional MI, and its gradient, on a unified computation graph. Modeling the network as a linear Gaussian directed acyclic graph (Gaussian-DAG), we obtain $I(V_A;V_B\,|\,V_C)$ in closed form: from the node-pair covariances produced by one K-recursion forward pass, it is a log-determinant difference of two sub-block Schur complements of the support covariance. The construction is built entirely from automatic-differentiation (AD) primitives, so any differentiable function of finitely many conditional MIs is end-to-end differentiable in the design parameters; this broad class includes linear objectives (weighted sum-rate, secrecy), the rate functions of standard multi-terminal rate regions, and non-linear composites of these. A single reverse-mode AD sweep yields the Wirtinger gradient with respect to all controllable factors at once, so any such objective can be handled by projected gradient iterations without problem-specific gradient derivation. We demonstrate the framework on three experiments: rate-region maximization for a two-user MIMO multiple-access channel, secure precoding on a MIMO wiretap channel, and the same rate-region objective applied to a larger multi-hop multiple-access network.

</details>


### [454] [Risk-Aware Information Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22524)
*Hamidou Tembine*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文通过用 expectiles 替代期望，建立了风险感知信息论，引入 expectile 熵、散度和互信息。这些量展现出香农风险中性框架下不可能的行为，包括风险寻求下的负散度以及与经典互信息的基本分离。在多用户系统中，该框架自然引出了信息交换的平均场博弈论，可达速率区域内生于异质风险敏感指数。结果表明香农信息无法量化驱动高级机器智能的极端风险，为风险感知通信、学习、集体智能和安全自主系统奠定基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 香农信息论是风险中性的，无法捕捉高级机器智能中的极端风险行为。现有理论缺乏对风险敏感信息交换的数学刻画，需要建立新的信息论框架以处理风险感知场景。

Method: 用 expectiles（一种统计风险度量）替代传统期望算子，重新定义熵、散度（KL散度）和互信息等核心信息论量。引入平均场博弈论建模多用户系统中的异质风险敏感信息交换。

Result: 定义了风险感知的信息论量，发现风险寻求下散度可为负值；风险感知互信息与经典互信息基本分离；多用户系统中可达速率区域由异质风险敏感系数内生决定。

Conclusion: 香农信息论无法量化驱动高级机器智能的极端风险，该框架为风险感知通信、学习、集体智能及安全自主系统提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We develop a risk-aware information theory by replacing expectation with expectiles, introducing expectile entropy, divergence, and mutual information. These quantities exhibit behaviors impossible under Shannon's risk-neutral framework, including negative divergence under risk-seeking regimes and a fundamental separation from classical mutual information. In multiuser systems, the framework naturally induces a mean-field-type game theory of information exchange, where achievable rate regions become endogenous to heterogeneous risk-sensitivity indices. Our results reveal that Shannon information alone cannot quantify the extreme risks driving advanced machine intelligence, establishing a foundation for risk-aware communication, learning, collective intelligence, and safe autonomous systems.

</details>


### [455] [Modulo Quantization Coding for Primitive Relay and Diamond Channels with Correlated Noises](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22313)
*Yuanxin Guo,Stark C. Draper,Wei Yu*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出模量化（MQ）编码，一种用于具有原始（即无噪声数字）中继链路和相关高斯噪声的简单、结构化、低复杂度方案。MQ编码通过模量化操作有效利用终端间的公共噪声分量，在完美相关噪声下可达中继信道容量，在菱形信道中取得优于已知界的可达界，在非完美相关噪声下能以更低复杂度接近压缩转发（CF）性能并在某些SNR范围内超越译码转发（DF）和解码转发（DF）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为具有原始中继链路（有限容量数字链路）和相关高斯噪声的信道设计一种简单、结构化且低复杂度的编码方案，以有效利用终端间的公共噪声分量，同时避免压缩转发（CF）的高复杂度和译码转发（DF）的性能限制。

Method: 提出模量化（Modulo Quantization, MQ）操作：将实值符号映射到其均匀量化索引模固定整数的结果。该操作使中继节点能够利用公共噪声分量，无需复杂的 Wyner-Ziv 压缩或全解码。

Result: (1) 对于完美相关噪声的高斯原始中继信道，MQ编码可达容量；(2) 对于完美相关噪声的高斯原始菱形信道，MQ编码取得优于已知界的可达界，并在某些SNR区域达到割集上界；(3) 对于高度但非完美相关噪声，MQ编码以显著低于压缩转发（CF）的复杂度接近CF性能，并在某些SNR范围超越译码转发（DF）；(4) 对于非完美相关噪声的菱形信道，MQ在中高SNR下同时优于CF和DF。

Conclusion: MQ编码是一种简单、结构化、低复杂度的方案，能有效利用相关噪声中的公共分量，在多种信道场景下实现性能与复杂度之间的良好权衡，特别适合具有有限容量数字中继链路的系统。

Abstract: This paper proposes modulo quantization (MQ) coding as a simple, structured, and low-complexity scheme for channels with primitive (i.e., noiseless digital) relay links and correlated Gaussian noises across terminals. The key component of MQ coding is the modulo quantization operation, which maps a real-valued symbol to its uniform-quantization index taken modulo a fixed integer. This operation allows effective exploitation of the common noise component shared across the terminals. For the Gaussian primitive relay channel with perfectly correlated noises, where a relay has a finite-capacity link to the receiver, MQ coding can be shown to achieve the capacity of this channel. For the Gaussian primitive diamond channel with perfectly correlated noises, where two relays can forward information through finite-capacity links to a receiver that has no direct observation of the transmitted signal, MQ coding yields novel achievability bounds that improve upon previously known bounds and coincide with the cut-set upper bound in certain signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) regimes. In scenarios with highly but non-perfectly correlated noises, MQ coding can approach the performance of compress-forward (CF) at significantly lower complexity, while surpassing decode-forward (DF) for the Gaussian primitive relay channel in certain SNR ranges. For the Gaussian primitive diamond channel with non-perfectly correlated noises, MQ can outperform both CF and DF at moderate SNR.

</details>


### [456] [Random Reed--Solomon Codes Correcting Permutations, Insertions, and Deletions over Polynomial-Size Alphabets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22344)
*Yijun Zhang,Yubo Sun,Xiande Zhang,Gennian Ge*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了Reed-Solomon码在对抗性坐标置换后插入删除错误下的性能。通过将Singleton界放宽εn，将字母表大小从指数级降至多项式级；同时给出了多项式超线性字母表大小的下界，并为二维Reed-Solomon码设计了平均O(n)时间解码器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前Con(2025)证明Reed-Solomon码在置换-插入删除设置下可达到精确的半数Singleton界，但需要指数级大的字母表。本文旨在研究在允许与界有εn的加性差距时，能否将字母表大小降至多项式级，并探索相应的下界和解码效率问题。

Method: 理论分析：对于固定常数R,ε∈(0,1)满足2R+ε<1，证明随机Reed-Solomon码在字母表大小n^{O_{R,ε}(1)}下，高概率抵抗任意坐标置换后最多(1-ε)n-2k+1个插入删除错误。同时给出字母表大小的下界证明。对于Con等(2024)构造的显式二维Reed-Solomon码，设计平均O(n)时间解码器。

Result: 1) 随机Reed-Solomon码在多项式大小字母表上可抵抗(1-ε)n-2k+1个置换-插入删除错误；2) 正速率码需要多项式超线性字母表；3) 二维Reed-Solomon码在O(n^3)字母表上具有平均O(n)时间解码器，可抵抗n-3个置换-插入删除错误。

Conclusion: 通过允许与Singleton界有εn的加性差距，成功将Reed-Solomon码在置换-插入删除设置下的字母表大小从指数级降至多项式级，并给出了配套的下界证明和高效解码器。

Abstract: We study Reed--Solomon codes against adversarial coordinate permutations followed by insertion-deletion (insdel) errors. It was previously shown by Con (2025) that Reed--Solomon codes can attain the exact half-Singleton bound in this setting, but only over exponentially large alphabets. We prove that, by allowing an additive $εn$ gap from this bound, the alphabet size can be reduced to polynomial. More precisely, for fixed constants $R,ε\in(0,1)$ satisfying $2R+ε<1$ and $k=Rn$, a random Reed--Solomon code of length $n$ and dimension $k$ over an alphabet of size $n^{O_{R,ε}(1)}$ is, with high probability, robust against arbitrary coordinate permutations followed by up to $(1-ε)n-2k+1$ insdel errors.
  We also prove a complementary alphabet-size lower bound, showing that positive-rate codes, which are robust against linearly many insdel errors in the permutation-insdel setting, require a polynomially superlinear alphabet.
  Finally, for the explicit two-dimensional Reed--Solomon codes constructed by Con et al. (2024) over alphabet size $O(n^3)$, we give an average $O(n)$-time decoder against arbitrary coordinate permutations followed by $n-3$ insdel errors. Previously, an $O(n)$-time decoder for this code was known only for the deletion setting.

</details>


### [457] [Study of Code-Aided Channel Estimation for Metasurface-Based Holographic MIMO Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22465)
*Roberto C. G. Porto,Rodrigo C. de Lamare*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于基于超表面的全息MIMO系统的迭代编码辅助检测、解码与信道估计方案，适用于堆叠智能超表面及其全连接版本。通过利用LDPC编码实现信道估计，并推导了超表面参数的闭式表达式，采用交替优化算法。数值结果在NMSE和BER上表现出显著提升，尤其在全连接架构中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对超表面全息MIMO系统中信道估计精度不足的问题，提出利用编码增益（LDPC码）迭代辅助信道估计，同时优化超表面参数以提升系统性能。

Method: 提出迭代编码辅助检测-解码-信道估计方案；利用LDPC编码的导频和奇偶校验比特共同迭代优化信道；推导超表面参数设计的闭式表达式；采用交替优化（AO）流程联合优化参数。

Result: 数值结果表明，所提方案在归一化均方误差（NMSE）和误码率（BER）上均有显著改善，其中BD-SIM-RIS（全连接架构）的性能提升尤为突出。

Conclusion: 所提出的迭代编码辅助方案能有效提升超表面全息MIMO系统的信道估计与检测性能，全连接架构相比堆叠架构具有更优的性能潜力。

Abstract: This work proposes an iterative code-aided detection, decoding, and channel estimation scheme for metasurface-based holographic MIMO systems employing stacked intelligent metasurfaces (SIM-RIS) and their fully connected counterparts (BD-SIM-RIS). A novel channel estimation strategy is developed by exploiting low-density parity-check (LDPC) coding in the uplink, enabling both pilot and parity bits of the encoded packet to contribute to the iterative refinement of the channel. In addition, closed-form expressions for the metasurface parameter design are derived and incorporated into an alternating-optimization (AO) procedure. Numerical results demonstrate substantial gains in normalized mean square error (NMSE) and bit error rate (BER), with particularly strong improvements observed for BD-SIM-RIS architectures.

</details>


### [458] [Quantum Codes with Transversal $CCZ$ Gates and Sublinear $Z$-Stabilizers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22472)
*Ohad Elishco,Itzhak Tamo*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文构造了具有横向量子CCZ门的量子CSS码，其Z-稳定子具有次线性权重的生成集。主要技术贡献是一个精细化的打孔定理，用局部条件替代全局对偶距离假设。将该定理应用于代数扩张码，得到了显式的增长字母表CSS码参数[[N, Θ(N), Ω(N^{1/m})]]（m≥3），并进一步通过射影重数技巧将字母表规模降至固定素域，保持跨导CCZ门、近线性维度和次线性Z-稳定子局域性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有框架将经典码转化为具有横向量子CCZ门的CSS码时，要求经典码同时具备良好的Schur积性质和大的对偶距离。代数扩张码虽然满足Schur积条件，但对偶距离很小，直接应用框架只能得到次线性量子维度。因此需要改进打孔定理，放宽对全局对偶距离的要求，从而利用代数扩张码构造具有大维度的量子CSS码。

Method: 1. 提出精细化打孔定理：将原框架中的全局对偶距离假设替换为仅作用于所选打孔集的局部条件。2. 将该定理应用于代数扩张码，构造增长字母表CSS码[[N, Θ(N), Ω(N^{1/m})]]，具有跨导CCZ门，且Z-稳定子生成集权重为O(N^{1/m})。3. 利用射影重数版本的乘法友好码，将字母表规模降至固定素域，得到固定素域CSS码三重，保持跨导CCZ门，维度近线性，距离为n^{1/m}（忽略多对数因子），Z-稳定子局域性仍为次线性。

Result: 1. 得到增长字母表CSS码：参数[[N, Θ(N), Ω(N^{1/m})]]，m≥3，具有跨导CCZ门，Z-稳定子生成集权重O(N^{1/m})。2. 得到固定素域CSS码：长度n，维度近线性，距离n^{1/m}（多对数因子内），Z-稳定子局域性次线性（多对数损失内），仍具有跨导CCZ门。

Conclusion: 通过精细化打孔定理解决了代数扩张码对偶距离小的问题，成功构造了具有跨导CCZ门的大维度量子CSS码，并实现了从增长字母表到固定素域的压缩，同时保持了次线性稳定子局域性。这为容错量子计算中非Clifford门的实现提供了新的码族构造。

Abstract: We construct quantum CSS codes with transversal \(CCZ\) gates whose \(Z\)-stabilizers admit sublinear-weight generating sets. We build on the algebraic puncturing framework of Guruswami and Golowich \cite{GG24}, which turns classical codes with the required Schur-product and distance conditions into CSS codes with transversal \(CCZ\). However, applying the framework directly to the algebraic expander codes of \cite{KT26} runs into their small dual distance, and therefore produces only sublinear quantum dimension. Our main technical step is a refined puncturing theorem in which the global dual-distance assumption is replaced by a condition only on the selected puncturing set. Applying this theorem to algebraic expander codes gives explicit growing-alphabet CSS codes with parameters \([[N,Θ(N),Ω(N^{1/m})]]\), for every fixed \(m\geq 3\), and with transversal \(CCZ\) gates. Moreover, the \(Z\)-stabilizer space has an explicit generating set of weight \(O(N^{1/m})\). We also reduce the alphabet to a fixed prime field using a projective-multiplicity version of multiplication-friendly codes. The resulting fixed-prime-field CSS code triples, of length \(n\), still have transversal \(CCZ\) gates. Their dimension is near-linear, their distance is \(n^{1/m}\)
  up to polylogarithmic factors, and the \(Z\)-stabilizer locality remains sublinear, again up to polylogarithmic losses.

</details>


### [459] [Robust SCMA Codebook Design: A Hardware-Aware Autoencoder Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22603)
*Zihao Liu,Zilong Liu,Leila Musavian*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 针对OFDM-SCMA系统中载波频率偏移(CFO)和相位噪声(PN)破坏子载波正交性的问题，提出了一种硬件感知的端到端自编码器方法，通过在训练循环中嵌入可微分的CFO和Wiener PN层来设计鲁棒的SCMA码本，仿真表明该方法无需实时相位跟踪即可有效抑制误码平层。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OFDM-SCMA系统中的CFO和PN会破坏子载波正交性，导致性能严重下降，现有方法多从接收端补偿角度出发，本文从码本设计的新角度解决问题。

Method: 提出硬件感知的端到端自编码器，将可微分的CFO层和Wiener PN层嵌入训练循环中，在训练过程中让码本学习对抗这些硬件 impairments。

Result: 所提出的码本能有效抑制由CFO和PN引起的误码平层，无需实时相位跟踪。

Conclusion: 从码本设计角度解决OFDM-SCMA系统中的硬件失真问题是一种有效的新思路，自编码器框架能够学习出鲁棒的码本。

Abstract: Sparse code multiple access (SCMA) is a promising code-domain non-orthogonal multiple access scheme which is transmitted over orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) to exploit multicarrier diversity. In practice, however, carrier frequency offset (CFO) and phase noise (PN) may disrupt the subcarrier orthogonality in OFDM-SCMA systems. Addressing this research problem from a new SCMA codebook design angle, we propose a hardware-aware end-to-end autoencoder that embeds differentiable CFO and Wiener PN layers into the training loop. Simulations show that the proposed codebook effectively suppresses the bit error floors caused by CFO and PN without requiring real-time phase tracking.

</details>


### [460] [Private Information Retrieval from Joint Systematic MDS-Coded with Non-Colluding Servers: Bounds and Constructions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22802)
*Jingke Xu,Lirong Shi,Peng Lan,Weijun Fang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了联合MDS编码私有信息检索（PIR）的容量问题。针对系统MDS阵列存储码的特定存储模式，推导了K=Mt和K=Mt+1两种情况下的容量上界，并构造了三种联合MDS编码PIR方案。这些方案在较小文件大小下实现了更高的检索速率，其中第一种和第三种方案优于传统分离MDS编码PIR方案的容量，第二种方案在存储率足够高时也优于后者。特别地，当K=Mt且N≤K+t时，所提方案达到推导的上界，表明该存储模式下的最优联合MDS编码PIR容量为1-(1-1/M)K/N。与相同存储码率下的容量可达分离方案相比，所提方案的相对检索速率改进可达15%（M≥4）、20%（M≥9），并渐近趋近1-2/e≈26.42%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联合MDS编码PIR可以突破分离MDS编码PIR的容量限制，但其容量问题尚未被充分探索。本文旨在研究特定存储模式下联合MDS编码PIR的容量，并构造更高效的检索方案。

Method: 首先推导K=Mt和K=Mt+1情况下联合MDS编码PIR的容量上界；然后针对三种不同参数条件（N≤K+t且K=Mt、N>K+t且K=Mt、N≤K+t且K=Mt+1）构造具体的联合MDS编码PIR方案。

Result: 提出的方案在较小文件大小下实现了更高的检索速率。当K=Mt且N≤K+t时，方案达到最优容量1-(1-1/M)K/N。与传统分离方案相比，相对检索速率改进超过15%（M≥4）、20%（M≥9），渐近趋近26.42%。

Conclusion: 在特定存储模式下，联合MDS编码PIR可以实现比分离MDS编码PIR更高的容量。对于K=Mt且N≤K+t的情况，本文给出了最优容量表达式，并提供了达到该容量的具体方案。

Abstract: Consider a distributed storage system consisting of $N$ non-colluding servers that collectively store a database of $M$ files encoded using an $[N,K]$ maximum distance separable(MDS) code. A user wishes to retrieve one file privately by accessing the servers without revealing the identity of the requested file. A scheme designed for this purpose is called a joint MDS-coded private information retrieval(PIR) scheme, which was first introduced by Sun and Tian in 2019 to break the capacity $\frac{1-K/N}{1-(K/N)^M}$ of the separate MDS-coded PIR schemes established by Banawan and Ulukus. However, the capacity of joint MDS-coded PIR remains largely unexplored.
  In this paper, we study the capacity of joint MDS-coded PIR with systematic MDS array storage codes under prescribed storage patterns. Specifically, we first derive upper bounds on the capacity of joint MDS-coded PIR for $K=Mt$ and $K=Mt+1$, respectively. We then construct three joint MDS-coded PIR schemes for the cases $N\le K+t, K=Mt$, $N>K+t, K=Mt$ and $N\le K+t, K=Mt+1$. The proposed schemes require small file sizes and achieve higher retrieval rates: the first and third schemes exceed the capacity of separate MDS-coded PIR schemes, while the second scheme does so when the storage rate $\frac{K}{N}>r_M$ for some $0<r_M<\frac{M}{M+1}$. In particular, for $K=Mt$ and $N\leq K+t$, the proposed scheme achieves the derived upper bound, thereby establishing that the optimal joint MDS-coded PIR capacity under the considered storage pattern is $1-(1-\frac{1}{M})\frac{K}{N}$. Compared with capacity-achieving separate MDS-coded PIR schemes at the same storage-code rate, the proposed schemes may achieve a substantial relative retrieval-rate improvement: the maximum improvement can exceed $15\%$ when $M\geq 4$, exceed $20\%$ when $M\geq 9$, and asymptotically approach $1-2/e\approx 26.42\%$ as M increases.

</details>


### [461] [Enormous Fluid Antenna Systems (E-FAS) for Wireless Sensing: Channel Modeling and Conditional Estimation Limits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23119)
*Farshad Rostami Ghadi,Kai-Kit Wong,Jose D. Vega-Sanchez,Kin-Fai Tong,Hyundong Shin*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文为集成感测与通信（ISAC）建立了基于巨大流体天线系统（E-FAS）的基础分析框架，将协调智能表面转变为巨大可重构电磁孔径，重点研究角度感知极限。通过建立双向感知信道模型、参数化观测模型及Fisher信息矩阵（FIM）和Cramér-Rao界（CRB），揭示了E-FAS与传统阵列和可重构表面辅助ISAC架构的根本不同。分析发现最大化相干路由增益并不最大化感知性能，暴露了可编程传播环境中表面波路由增益与感知多样性之间的基本权衡。数值结果验证了该框架，表明在相同发射功率下E-FAS实现ISAC可显著提升角度感知性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ISAC架构（阵列式和可重构表面辅助式）在感知性能上存在局限，亟需开发能够突破传统衍射极限和波束赋形瓶颈的新型电磁孔径架构，以实现更高精度的角度感知。

Method: 首先建立双向感知信道模型（包含表面波路由、分布式再辐射、目标散射和回波传播）；据此构建参数化观测模型；推导Fisher信息矩阵和Cramér-Rao界用于角度估计性能分析；进行路由增益与感知多样性之间的权衡分析。

Result: E-FAS衍生出与传统阵列式和可重构表面辅助式ISAC截然不同的感知机制；最大化相干路由增益并非感知性能的最优策略；路由增益与感知多样性之间存在根本性权衡；在相同发射功率下E-FAS系统相比传统架构实现显著的角度感知增益。

Conclusion: E-FAS为ISAC提供了全新范式，需联合优化传播路由与感知功能以实现最佳性能，其可编程传播环境特性为突破传统感知极限开辟了新路径。

Abstract: In this paper, we develop a fundamental analytical framework for integrated sensing and communications (ISAC) enabled by the Enormous Fluid Antenna System (E-FAS), which transforms a collection of coordinated intelligent surfaces into a gigantic reconfigurable electromagnetic aperture, with particular emphasis on the limits of angular sensing.We begin by developing a bidirectional sensing channel model that explicitly captures the complete sensing process, including surface-wave (SW) routing, distributed reradiation, target scattering, and echo propagation. Based on this channel model, we formulate a parametric observation model for target sensing and derive the associated Fisher information matrix (FIM) and Cramer-Rao bound (CRB) for angular estimation. The analysis demonstrates that E-FAS gives rise to a fundamentally different sensing regime compared with conventional array-based and reconfigurable-surface-aided ISAC architectures. Our analysis uncovers that maximizing coherent routing gain does not necessarily maximize sensing performance, exposing a fundamental trade-off between SW routing gain and sensing diversity in programmable propagation environments. Numerical results validate the developed framework and demonstrate that E-FAS-enabled ISAC systems can achieve substantial angular sensing gains over conventional architectures under the same transmit-power budget. The results further underscore the importance of jointly optimizing propagation routing and sensing functionality, positioning E-FAS as a new paradigm for ISAC.

</details>


### [462] [Movable Antennas for Robust Wireless Sensing via Joint Cramér-Rao Bound and Sidelobe Minimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23154)
*Wenyan Ma,Lipeng Zhu,Weitong Zhai,Rui Zhang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出一种面向可移动天线（MA）无线感知系统的天线位置优化方法，通过联合最小化克拉美-罗界（CRB）和模糊函数最大旁瓣电平（MSL），并开发了基于逐次凸近似（SCA）的优化算法，实现了在不同信噪比（SNR）区间内波达角（AoA）估计均方误差（MSE）的显著降低，性能优于传统均匀/非均匀固定位置天线（FPA）阵列。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可移动天线无线感知系统的设计中，CRB最小化与模糊函数旁瓣抑制之间存在根本性权衡：高SNR下MSE由CRB主导（窄主瓣最优），低SNR下由旁瓣误差主导（宽主瓣最优），而传统方法无法在不同SNR区间内自适应平衡这一矛盾，导致鲁棒性不足。

Method: 1) 将AoA估计MSE分解为主瓣内局部估计误差（CRB）和旁瓣导致的模糊误差；2) 分析CRB与MSL的权衡关系：最小化CRB需天线集中于1D移动区域两端（窄主瓣），最小化MSL需天线集中于区域中心（宽主瓣）；3) 构建约束MSL下的CRB最小化优化问题；4) 提出SCA算法优化天线位置向量（APV）；5) 设计一维线性搜索方法确定任意给定SNR下的最优MSL阈值。

Result: 数值结果表明，所提方案有效平衡了MSL与CRB最小化之间的权衡，在全部SNR范围内相比传统均匀/非均匀FPA阵列实现了显著更低的AoA估计MSE。

Conclusion: 通过天线位置优化联合考虑CRB与MSL，可实现在不同SNR区间内鲁棒的感知性能，为可移动天线无线感知系统的设计提供了新的理论依据和工程方案。

Abstract: This paper presents a novel design approach for movable antenna (MA)-enabled wireless sensing systems by jointly minimizing the Cramér-Rao bound (CRB) and the maximum sidelobe level (MSL) of the ambiguity function via antenna position optimization. In particular, the mean squared error (MSE) of angle-of-arrival (AoA) estimation is decomposed into a local estimation error within the mainlobe of the ambiguity function (i.e., CRB) and an additional ambiguity error caused by its sidelobes. Since the MSE is dominated by the CRB in the high-signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) regime but by the sidelobes of the ambiguity function in the low-SNR regime, our analysis reveals a fundamental trade-off between CRB minimization and MSL minimization in the moderate-SNR regime. Specifically, minimizing the CRB prefers a narrower mainlobe, where antennas are concentrated near the two edges of the one-dimensional (1-D) movement region; whereas minimizing the MSL favors a wider mainlobe, where antennas are distributed more densely near the center of the movement region. Inspired by this and to ensure robust sensing performance across different SNR regimes, we formulate an optimization problem to minimize the CRB subject to a prescribed MSL constraint via antenna position optimization. An efficient successive convex approximation (SCA) algorithm is developed to optimize the antenna position vector (APV), and a 1-D linear search method is proposed to determine the optimal MSL threshold that minimizes the actual MSE for any given SNR. Numerical results demonstrate that the proposed scheme effectively balances the trade-off between MSL and CRB minimization, thus achieving a significantly lower AoA estimation MSE across the entire SNR range compared to conventional uniform and non-uniform fixed-position antenna (FPA) arrays.

</details>


### [463] [Tighter Bounds for Algorithmic Complexity Estimation Using a Reusable Code-Based Block Decomposition Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23471)
*Eduardo Yuji Sakabe,Felipe S. Abrahão,Santiago Hernández-Orozco,Ricardo Gudwin,Hector Zenil*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于算法注意力的BDM扩展版本，通过重用可复用程序代码和条件描述来减少对象分解中的描述长度，将相关组件的共享结构纳入考量，并证明该方法的优化问题是NP-hard的，同时建立了与算法互信息的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: BDM虽能通过结合局部算法复杂度估计和全局香农熵来从CTM扩展到更大对象，但原始BDM未充分利用块间依赖关系，导致重复或相关的组件被独立描述，造成描述资源的浪费。本文旨在通过引入算法注意力机制，利用块间依赖实现更高效的描述长度分配。

Method: 将BDM中块间依赖关系的利用形式化为一个重用优化问题，允许重复或相关组件不必被独立描述，而是通过条件描述共享结构信息；证明精确优化是NP-hard的；推导出改善独立描述的条件；将可实现的增益与算法互信息关联；证明与先前BDM版本的关系；提供使用CTM导出的复杂度和条件复杂度估计的实现路线图。

Result: 形式化了算法注意力作为描述资源的分配机制；证明重用优化是NP-hard问题；导出了能改善独立描述的条件；建立了与算法互信息的关系；证明了与原始BDM的关系。

Conclusion: 基于算法注意力的BDM扩展能更有效地利用块间共享结构，减少描述长度，尽管优化是NP-hard的，但通过条件复杂度和算法互信息的理论框架，为实际实现提供了可行路线。

Abstract: The Block Decomposition Method (BDM) was introduced as an alternative to popular lossless compression methods such as LZW for estimating algorithmic complexity from the principles of algorithmic probability and classical information theory. It extends the Coding Theorem Method (CTM) from small objects to larger ones by combining local estimates of algorithmic complexity with a global account of repetition based on Shannon entropy. Here, we introduce a version of BDM in which dependencies between blocks are utilized to reduce the length of the description based on reusable program code in the decomposition of an object, and on conditional descriptions capable of accounting for shared structure between observations. We formalize this allocation of descriptive resources as algorithmic attention. Repeated or related components need not be described independently, and the resulting reduction in description length is governed by the amount of shared algorithmic information. We formulate this extension as a reuse optimization problem, show that exact optimization is NP-hard, derive conditions under which it improves upon independent descriptions, relate the achievable gains to algorithmic mutual information, prove the relationship with the previous BDM version, and provide a roadmap for its implementation using CTM-derived complexity and conditional complexity estimates.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [464] [Human Decision-Making with AI Assistance under Correlated Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20628)
*Yanru Guan,Naveen Raman,Fei Fang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究在特征相关条件下，AI如何通过推荐测试来平衡人类短期决策质量与长期学习效果，证明最优策略需遵循"先探索后承诺"的结构，并提出相关算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类越来越多地依赖AI辅助决策（如医生遵循AI推荐的诊断测试），当不同特征（如测试结果）相关时，需要研究AI应推荐哪些测试以平衡短期决策质量和长期人类学习效果。

Method: 通过理论证明分析特征独立与相关情形下最优策略的差异，证明最优策略必须遵循"先探索后承诺"结构；证明求解最优策略是NP-hard问题；提出基于动态规划的最优策略算法（有限时域）和近似算法（短时域规划+平稳后缀）。

Result: 特征独立时平稳策略最优，但特征相关时平稳策略性能可能任意差；最优策略需先探索后承诺，探索长度取决于特征相关程度；计算最优策略是NP-hard；所提算法在有限时域可求最优，近似算法可达到近最优性能；实证表明特征相关性越强，探索阶段越长。

Conclusion: 在特征相关条件下，AI辅助决策最优策略需先提供多样化测试供人类学习准确的特征系数，再承诺单一测试集；探索阶段长度与特征相关程度正相关。

Abstract: Humans increasingly make decisions with AI assistance; for example, doctors may follow AI-recommended diagnostic tests and base their diagnoses on the results. A natural question is which tests should AI recommend to balance short-term decision quality and long-term human learning when different features (e.g., test results) are correlated. While prior work establishes that stationary policies that recommend the same tests repeatedly are optimal when features are independent, we prove that feature correlations lead such policies to perform arbitrarily poorly. Instead, we prove that any optimal policy must follow an explore-then-commit structure; initially, the AI should offer diverse tests so humans can learn accurate feature coefficients, then the AI should commit to a single set of tests, with exploration length that depends on the degree of feature correlation. We prove that computing the optimal policy is NP-hard and derive a dynamic programming-based algorithm that finds the optimal policy for finite horizons. We additionally develop an approximation that plans for shorter horizons and appends a stationary suffix, achieving near-optimal performance. Our empirical results complement our theory by showing that stronger feature correlation leads to longer exploration phases.

</details>


### [465] [Measuring Behavior Portability in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22797)
*Tianjia Dong,Nadav Kunievsky,James A. Evans*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 大语言模型在不同决策环境中存在行为可移植性损失，即使这些环境在激励结构上等价，其行为映射也无法可靠迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在收益等价但表面呈现不同的决策环境中表现出行为映射差异，导致基于特定套件的评估不可靠，引出了行为可移植性的根本问题。

Method: 提出形式化框架，通过在源环境池上拟合可解释行为模型，评估其在目标环境中的样本外预测性能，使用与损失无关的度量给出最坏情况界，并以基准模型对比。

Result: 在七个经典经济决策问题的实验中，观察到显著且系统的可移植性损失，表明LLM在一个环境中获得的行为描述无法可靠迁移到结构等价的替代环境。

Conclusion: LLM的行为特征在不同决策环境间不具备可靠的跨环境可移植性，这对依赖单一环境评估的可靠性提出了挑战。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous decision makers, yet the behavioral mapping they exhibit can vary substantially across decision environments that are payoff-equivalent by construction-environments that share identical payoff-relevant structure but differ in surface presentation. This sensitivity renders suite-based evaluation fragile and raises a fundamental question of behavioral portability: how well does a behavioral mapping learned in one decision environment informative on another that preserves the same underlying incentive structure? We introduce a formal framework to measure this property. Our protocol fits an interpretable behavioral model on data pooled from a set of source environments and evaluates its out-of-sample predictive performance in a held-out target environment, benchmarking against an oracle trained directly on target data. Portability is quantified via a loss-agnostic measure that delivers worst-case bounds on the performance of the induced prediction-action mapping in the target environment. In controlled experiments spanning seven canonical economic decision problems, we document substantial and systematic portability losses, suggesting that behavioral characterizations of LLMs obtained in one decision environment cannot be assumed to transfer reliably to structurally equivalent alternatives.

</details>


### [466] [ARIA: A Causal-Aware Framework for Rescuing LLM Reasoning in Trustworthy Materials Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22375)
*Yi Cao,Liaoyaqi Wang,Jieneng Chen,Benjamin Van Durme,Alan Yuille,Paulette Clancy*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出ARIA框架，通过因果感知的三级级联推理（直接因果推理、物理类比迁移、参数化回退）来解决大语言模型在材料发现中的"上下文隧道效应"（过度锚定局部证据而抑制全局物理推理），并在包含2,839条PSP关系的知识图谱上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成模型在材料发现中常违反物理因果性，LLM增强知识图谱时存在"上下文隧道效应"——模型过度锚定检索到的狭窄证据，抑制全局物理推理，亟需因果感知的推理框架。

Method: ARIA框架采用三级级联路由：(i) 完整PSP证据链时直接因果推理；(ii) 稀疏或新材料系统时物理类比迁移；(iii) 外部证据不完整时显式参数化回退。构建包含2,839条PSP关系的知识图谱进行评估。

Result: ARIA缓解了上下文隧道效应，在二维材料的前向预测和逆向设计任务上优于无增强和朴素KG增强基线，结合在线文献搜索可获得进一步提升，并产生可审计的因果追踪。

Conclusion: ARIA通过因果感知的知识使用策略实现了物理可信、可审计的AI辅助材料发现，为生成模型在科学发现中的应用提供了因果保障。

Abstract: Generative models have revolutionized the process of materials discovery, yet they often fail to satisfy underlying physical causality. Through an analysis of Large Language Models (LLMs) augmented with knowledge graphs derived from current literature, we uncover a phenomenon termed contextual tunneling, where models "over-anchor" on narrow, retrieved evidence while suppressing global physical reasoning. To address this problem, we introduce ARIA, a causal-aware framework that conditions knowledge use on mechanistic completeness. ARIA routes each query through a three-tier cascade: (i) direct causal reasoning when complete evidence chains of Process-Structure-Property (PSP) are available, (ii) physics-informed analogical transfer for sparse or novel material systems, and (iii) explicit parametric fallback when external evidence is incomplete. As a proof of concept, we construct a Knowledge Graph (KG) containing 2,839 extracted PSP relations from peer-reviewed articles in the materials literature and evaluate ARIA on forward prediction and inverse design tasks for two-dimensional (2D) materials. ARIA mitigates contextual tunneling, improves over unaugmented and naive KG-augmented baselines, and provides further gains when an online literature search is used for evidence enrichment. Crucially, ARIA produces auditable causal traces, enabling physically grounded and trustworthy AI-assisted materials discovery.

</details>


### [467] [MetaPS: Adaptive Programmatic Strategy Selection for Market Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22385)
*Jiaxiang Chen,Aotian Luo,Zhouyi Zheng,Weiyi Huang,Chi Zhang,Zenglin Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出MetaPS框架，通过模拟市场环境指导大语言模型从预编程策略库中自适应选择最优策略，实验表明该方法在多个规模模型上优于固定策略、直接决策和API提示基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单一市场策略无法在所有市场条件下获胜，而让大语言模型直接生成市场动作缺乏可靠性和可解释性，因此需要一种更可控、可执行且自适应的策略选择机制。

Method: MetaPS框架包含三个阶段：①在模拟/回测市场中展开候选策略；②识别特定状态下能带来更好未来收益的策略-状态对，转化为监督微调数据；③推理时仅依赖当前市场状态和策略上下文选择策略程序，再由选定程序执行最终动作。

Result: 在多股票交易和受控商品交换沙箱实验中，MetaPS在0.8B到9B参数规模的模型上持续取得改进，优于固定策略基线、直接决策智能体以及基于API提示的LLM智能体；在某些设置中，紧凑微调模型甚至超越了更强的API模型。

Conclusion: 市场模拟可以为学习自适应、可解释且可执行的策略选择提供可扩展且有目标导向的监督信号。

Abstract: No single market strategy always wins: momentum, mean reversion, risk control,and event-driven rules can each succeed or fail as market conditions change.Rather than asking large language models to directly generate market actions,we study an executable decision paradigm where an agent selects from a library of programmatic strategies, each implemented as a code module mapping market observations to actions.We propose \textbf{MetaPS}, a simulation-guided framework for adaptive programmatic strategy selection. MetaPS rolls out candidate strategies in simulated or backtested markets, identifies states where particular strategies lead to better future outcomes, and converts these state--strategy pairs into supervised fine-tuning data. During inference, the simulator is no longer queried: MetaPS observes only the current market state and candidate strategy context, selects a suitable strategy program, and the selected program produces the final action. Experiments on multi-stock trading and a controlled goods-exchange sandbox show that MetaPS consistently improves across model scales from 0.8B to 9B parameters. It outperforms fixed-strategy baselines, direct decision-making agents, and prompted API-based LLM agents; in several settings, compact fine-tuned models even surpass stronger API models. These results demonstrate that market simulations can provide scalable and targeted supervision for learning adaptive, interpretable, and executable strategy selection.

</details>


### [468] [PEAR: Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20621)
*Yang Feng,Ziwei Xu,Xia Hu,Fengxiang He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PEAR是一种排列等变的自适应路由多智能体辩论协议，通过动态重新配置通信角色和稀疏拓扑结构，有效克服了固定辩论拓扑中的位置偏见、不可靠智能体放大和角色分配敏感性问题，在四个推理基准和六个LLM骨干网络上显著提升了平均准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有固定拓扑的多智能体辩论存在三个关键缺陷：持久的位置偏见（某些位置总是占据优势）、不可靠智能体的影响力被放大、以及对角色分配高度敏感，导致辩论质量不稳定。

Method: 提出排列等变自适应路由多智能体辩论协议，在连续辩论轮次间动态重新配置通信角色和稀疏拓扑结构，根据演化中的智能体状态策略性地切换智能体到角色的分配，防止任何智能体永久占据特权网络位置，从而更均匀地分配影响力。

Result: 在四个推理基准和六个不同LLM骨干网络上，PEAR显著优于最强的辩论基线方法。从理论上证明PEAR是一种等变稀疏路由器：在智能体重标号下保持准确性，同时降低路由复杂度并提升泛化能力。

Conclusion: 动态重配置通信拓扑和角色分配是提升多智能体辩论系统鲁棒性和性能的有效策略，PEAR通过排列等变的自适应路由机制解决了固定拓扑的核心缺陷。

Abstract: Multi-agent debate improves the reliability of large language models (LLMs) through iterative peer critiques. However, fixed topologies often introduce persistent positional biases, amplify unreliable agents, and cause high sensitivity to role assignments. We introduce \textit{Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate (PEAR)}, an inference-time protocol that dynamically reconfigures communication roles and sparse topologies across consecutive debate rounds. By strategically switching agent-to-role assignments based on evolving agent states, PEAR prevents any agent from permanently occupying a privileged network position or distributes influence more evenly across the debate. We theoretically characterize PEAR as an equivariant sparse router: it preserves accuracy under agent relabeling while reducing routing complexity and improving generalization. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across four reasoning benchmarks and six diverse LLM backbones demonstrate PEAR significantly improves average accuracy over the strongest debate baselines. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/PEAR.

</details>


### [469] [Path-dependent program induction under resource constraints explains human sequence learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20623)
*Hanqi Zhou,David G. Nagy,Peter Dayan,Charley M. Wu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文整合率失真理论与程序归纳，提出层级适应语法（HAG）模型，通过局部与全局知识库的联合约束，在有限认知资源下实现从序列经验中构建抽象可重用知识。实验表明HAG在率失真权衡和泛化上优于基线模型，且人类行为数据（旋律回忆与续写）支持层级知识库的认知假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在有限认知资源约束下，人类如何从序列经验中构建抽象、可重用的知识结构。

Method: 将率失真理论与程序归纳相结合，提出层级适应语法（HAG）模型，包含局部（任务内）和全局（跨任务）两个知识库，受记忆和计算资源共同约束。

Result: 模拟实验表明HAG在率失真权衡和泛化能力上优于固定语法和浅层组块方法；在线旋律序列学习实验中，参与者的回忆错误表现出系统性简化，反应时在推断的程序边界处增加，层级知识库模型最好地解释了回忆和续写选择的个体差异。

Conclusion: 结构化学习可视为有界程序归纳，经验顺序塑造了学习者未来构建的抽象结构。

Abstract: How do people build abstract, reusable knowledge from sequential experience under bounded cognitive resources? To answer this question, we integrate rate-distortion theory with recent advances in program induction to describe how prior knowledge shapes which future structures are cheap to encode and easy to discover. We formalize this in a hierarchical Adaptor Grammar (HAG) with distinct local (within-task) and global (across-task) libraries, governed jointly by constraints on memory and computation. In simulations, HAG achieves better rate-distortion trade-offs and stronger generalization than fixed grammars or shallow chunking methods. In an online melodic sequence-learning experiment, participants' recall errors reflected systematic simplifications and reaction times increased at inferred program boundaries. Trial-by-trial fits further showed that hierarchical libraries best explained individual differences in both recall and out-of-sample continuation choices, outperforming all alternative models. These findings cast structured learning as bounded program induction in which the order of experience shapes future abstractions a learner builds.

</details>


### [470] [In LLM Reasoning, there is Irrationality on top of Value Misalignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20624)
*Kejiang Qian,Fengxiang He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出“理性价值风险”概念，形式化定义了LLM在部署推理策略与理性策略之间的效用差距，并验证了这种风险普遍存在、价值对齐无法消除、对推理策略高度敏感、长推理可改善但收益递减。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 即使LLM在训练后对齐良好，其推理过程中仍可能无法最大化对齐价值，现有研究缺乏对这一差距的形式化定义和系统分析。

Method: 形式化定义理性价值风险为部署推理策略与理性策略（最大化期望效用的最优方向）之间的效用差异，并将估计误差分解为有限候选、有限提示和不完美验证器三个来源。在多个模型族和基准上进行实验验证。

Result: (1) 理性价值风险普遍存在；(2) 价值对齐可减少但无法消除该风险；(3) 该风险对推理策略高度敏感；(4) 更长推理可改善理性但存在边际递减效应。

Conclusion: LLM的理性价值风险是普遍且难以完全消除的，推理策略的选择对风险影响显著，未来需关注推理层面的理性优化。

Abstract: Significant progress has been made in aligning LLMs with target value functions. We argue that, even when an LLM has been well aligned in (post-)training, it may still fail to maximise the aligned value in reasoning. We mathematically formalise this gap as rational value risk: the utility discrepancy between a model's deployed reasoning strategy and its rational counterpart, which is defined to be the responses that maximise expected utility in the steepest direction. The estimation error of rational value risk is further decomposed into three components from finite candidates, finite prompts, and imperfect verifiers. Extensive experiments are conducted, covering models Llama-3.1, Qwen-2.5, T{\"}ulu-3 families (7B-72B), GPT-5.2, GPT-5.5, and DeepSeek-V4, and benchmarks UltraFeedback, AlpacaEval, GSM8K, MATH, HumanEval, and MathArena. The results validate that (1) rational value risk is widespread; (2) value alignment can reduce, but cannot eliminate, it; (3) the risk is highly sensitive to inference-time reasoning strategy; and (4) longer reasoning improves rationality with diminishing returns. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/LLM-Rationality.

</details>


### [471] [AlphaMemo: Structured Search-Process Memory for Self-Evolving Alpha Mining Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20625)
